#LineLine coverage
 1using CodeMeridian.Core.CodeGraph;
 2using Neo4j.Driver;
 3
 4namespace CodeMeridian.Infrastructure.Graph;
 5
 6/// <summary>
 7/// Structural analytics queries — impact, hotspots, coverage, churn, etc.
 8/// Core CRUD and schema live in Neo4jCodeGraphRepository.cs.
 9/// GDS (PageRank, Betweenness, Louvain) live in Neo4jCodeGraphRepository.Gds.cs.
 10/// </summary>
 11public sealed partial class Neo4jCodeGraphRepository
 12{
 13    private const string StructuralDependencyRelationships = "Calls|Uses|DependsOn|UsesClass|UsesId|DefinesSelector|Impo
 14    private const string StructuralTraversalRelationships = StructuralDependencyRelationships + "|Implements|Inherits";
 15    private const string ConnectionRelationships = StructuralTraversalRelationships + "|Contains";
 16    private const string WorkflowAdjacentTypeList = "['ApiEndpoint','File','ExternalConcept','MessageTopic','ExternalSer
 17
 18    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Source, CodeNode Target, string RelationshipType)>> FindCrossProjectDepend
 19        string? projectContext = null,
 20        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 21    {
 022        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 23
 024        var cypher = $"""
 025            MATCH (source:CodeNode)-[r:{StructuralDependencyRelationships}]->(target:CodeNode)
 026            WHERE source.projectContextNormalized <> target.projectContextNormalized
 027              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL
 028                   OR source.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized
 029                   OR target.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 030            RETURN source, target, type(r) AS relType
 031            ORDER BY source.projectContext, target.projectContext
 032            LIMIT 100
 033            """;
 34
 035        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new { projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext) 
 036        var results = new List<(CodeNode, CodeNode, string)>();
 37
 038        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 39        {
 040            results.Add((
 041                MapToCodeNode(record["source"].As<INode>()),
 042                MapToCodeNode(record["target"].As<INode>()),
 043                record["relType"].As<string>()));
 44        }
 45
 046        return results;
 047    }
 48
 49    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<CodeNode>> FindCoverageGapsAsync(
 50        string? projectContext = null,
 51        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 52    {
 053        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 54
 055        var prodRole = FileRoleExpression("prod");
 056        var testRole = FileRoleExpression("test");
 057        var testPredicate = $"""
 058            (
 059                {testRole} = 'Test'
 060                OR test.namespaceNormalized CONTAINS 'test'
 061                OR test.filePathNormalized CONTAINS 'test'
 062                OR test.nameNormalized CONTAINS 'test'
 063                OR test.filePathNormalized CONTAINS '.spec.'
 064                OR test.filePathNormalized CONTAINS '.test.'
 065            )
 066            """;
 067        var cypher = $@"
 068            MATCH (prod:CodeNode)
 069            WHERE prod.type IN ['Class', 'Method']
 070              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR prod.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 071              AND {prodRole} IN ['Source', 'Unknown']
 072              AND NOT EXISTS {{
 073                MATCH (test:CodeNode)-[:Calls]->(prod)
 074                WHERE {testPredicate}
 075              }}
 076            OPTIONAL MATCH (caller:CodeNode)-[:Calls|Uses|DependsOn|UsesClass|UsesId|DefinesSelector|ImportsStyle|UsesCs
 077            WITH prod, count(DISTINCT caller) AS fanIn,
 078                 CASE
 079                   WHEN prod.filePathNormalized CONTAINS '/program.cs' THEN 1
 080                   WHEN prod.nameNormalized IN ['dependencyinjection', 'neo4joptions', 'embeddingoptions'] THEN 1
 081                   WHEN prod.nameNormalized ENDS WITH 'options' THEN 1
 082                   WHEN prod.nameNormalized ENDS WITH 'endpoints' THEN 1
 083                   WHEN prod.nameNormalized ENDS WITH 'tools' THEN 1
 084                   ELSE 0
 085                 END AS infrastructureRank
 086            RETURN prod
 087            ORDER BY infrastructureRank ASC,
 088                     fanIn DESC,
 089                     coalesce(prod.lineCount, 0) DESC,
 090                     coalesce(prod.changeCount, 0) DESC,
 091                     prod.type,
 092                     prod.name
 093            LIMIT 100
 094            ";
 95
 096        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new { projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext) 
 097        var results = new List<CodeNode>();
 98
 099        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 0100            results.Add(MapToCodeNode(record["prod"].As<INode>()));
 101
 0102        return results;
 0103    }
 104
 105    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Node, string MatchType)>> FindRelatedTestsAsync(
 106        string nodeId,
 107        string? projectContext = null,
 108        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 109    {
 0110        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 111
 0112        var testRole = FileRoleExpression("test");
 0113        var testPredicate = $"""
 0114            (
 0115                {testRole} = 'Test'
 0116                OR test.namespaceNormalized CONTAINS 'test'
 0117                OR test.filePathNormalized CONTAINS 'test'
 0118                OR test.nameNormalized CONTAINS 'test'
 0119                OR test.filePathNormalized CONTAINS '.spec.'
 0120                OR test.filePathNormalized CONTAINS '.test.'
 0121            )
 0122            """;
 123        const string directCypherPrefix = """
 124            MATCH (test:CodeNode)-[:Calls]->(target:CodeNode {id: $nodeId})
 125            WHERE ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR test.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 126            """;
 0127        var directCypher = $@"
 0128            {directCypherPrefix}
 0129              AND {testPredicate}
 0130            RETURN test AS node, 'direct' AS matchType
 0131            ORDER BY test.name
 0132            LIMIT 25
 0133            ";
 134
 135        const string heuristicCypherPrefix = """
 136            MATCH (target:CodeNode {id: $nodeId})
 137            MATCH (test:CodeNode)
 138            WHERE ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR test.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 139            """;
 0140        var heuristicCypher = $@"
 0141            {heuristicCypherPrefix}
 0142              AND {testPredicate}
 0143              AND (
 0144                test.filePath = target.filePath
 0145                OR test.namespace = target.namespace
 0146                OR test.filePathNormalized CONTAINS target.nameNormalized
 0147                OR test.nameNormalized CONTAINS target.nameNormalized
 0148                OR target.nameNormalized CONTAINS test.nameNormalized
 0149              )
 0150              AND NOT EXISTS {{
 0151                MATCH (test)-[:Calls]->(target)
 0152              }}
 0153            RETURN test AS node, 'heuristic' AS matchType
 0154            ORDER BY test.name
 0155            LIMIT 25
 0156            ";
 157
 0158        var matches = new List<(CodeNode Node, string MatchType)>();
 159
 0160        foreach (var cypher in new[] { directCypher, heuristicCypher })
 161        {
 0162            var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new
 0163            {
 0164                nodeId,
 0165                projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext)
 0166            });
 167
 0168            await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 169            {
 0170                matches.Add((
 0171                    MapToCodeNode(record["node"].As<INode>()),
 0172                    record["matchType"].As<string>()));
 173            }
 174        }
 175
 0176        return matches
 177            .GroupBy(match => match.Node.Id)
 178            .Select(group => group.First())
 0179            .ToArray();
 0180    }
 181
 182    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Node, DateTimeOffset ChangedAt, string ChangeType)>> FindRecentlyChangedAs
 183        string? projectContext,
 184        TimeSpan window,
 185        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 186    {
 0187        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 188
 0189        var cutoffMs = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow.Subtract(window).ToUnixTimeMilliseconds();
 190
 191        const string cypher = """
 192            MATCH (n:CodeNode)
 193            WHERE ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 194              AND (n.createdAt >= $cutoff OR n.updatedAt >= $cutoff)
 195            WITH n,
 196                 CASE WHEN n.createdAt >= $cutoff AND (n.updatedAt IS NULL OR n.createdAt = n.updatedAt)
 197                      THEN 'created' ELSE 'updated' END AS changeType,
 198                 CASE WHEN n.updatedAt IS NOT NULL THEN n.updatedAt ELSE n.createdAt END AS changedAt
 199            RETURN n, changedAt, changeType
 200            ORDER BY changedAt DESC
 201            LIMIT 50
 202            """;
 203
 0204        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new
 0205        {
 0206            projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext),
 0207            cutoff = cutoffMs
 0208        });
 209
 0210        var results = new List<(CodeNode, DateTimeOffset, string)>();
 211
 0212        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 213        {
 0214            var changedAt = DateTimeOffset.FromUnixTimeMilliseconds(record["changedAt"].As<long>());
 0215            results.Add((MapToCodeNode(record["n"].As<INode>()), changedAt, record["changeType"].As<string>()));
 216        }
 217
 0218        return results;
 0219    }
 220
 221    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Node, int Distance)>> FindImpactAsync(
 222        string nodeId,
 223        int depth = 5,
 224        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 225    {
 0226        var paths = await FindImpactPathsAsync(nodeId, depth, cancellationToken);
 0227        return paths
 228            .Select(path => (path.Node, path.Distance))
 0229            .ToList();
 0230    }
 231
 232    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<ImpactPath>> FindImpactPathsAsync(
 233        string nodeId,
 234        int depth = 5,
 235        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 236    {
 0237        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 238
 0239        var maxDepth = Math.Clamp(depth, 1, 8);
 0240        var cypher = $$"""
 0241            MATCH (target:CodeNode {id: $nodeId})
 0242            WITH target, target.type AS targetType
 0243            CALL {
 0244                WITH target
 0245                OPTIONAL MATCH (target)-[:Contains*0..2]->(targetMember:CodeNode)
 0246                WITH target, collect(DISTINCT target) + collect(DISTINCT targetMember) AS targets
 0247                UNWIND targets AS targetNode
 0248                WITH DISTINCT target, targetNode, targets
 0249                WHERE targetNode IS NOT NULL
 0250                MATCH path = (caller:CodeNode)-[:{{StructuralTraversalRelationships}}*1..8]->(targetNode)
 0251                WHERE none(candidate IN targets WHERE candidate = caller)
 0252                WITH target,
 0253                     targetNode,
 0254                     caller,
 0255                     path,
 0256                     length(path) AS rawDist,
 0257                     [n IN nodes(path) | n] AS pathNodes,
 0258                     [r IN relationships(path) | { type: type(r), confidence: r.confidence }] AS pathRelationships
 0259                ORDER BY caller.id, rawDist ASC
 0260                WITH target,
 0261                     targetNode,
 0262                     caller,
 0263                     collect({
 0264                         rawDist: rawDist,
 0265                         pathNodes: pathNodes,
 0266                         pathRelationships: pathRelationships
 0267                     })[0] AS best
 0268                WITH target,
 0269                     targetNode,
 0270                     caller,
 0271                     best.rawDist AS rawDist,
 0272                     best.pathNodes AS pathNodes,
 0273                     best.pathRelationships AS pathRelationships
 0274                RETURN caller,
 0275                       rawDist + CASE WHEN targetNode = target THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS dist,
 0276                       CASE
 0277                           WHEN targetNode <> target AND caller.type IN {{WorkflowAdjacentTypeList}} THEN 'workflow'
 0278                           WHEN targetNode <> target AND last(pathRelationships).type = 'DependsOn' THEN 'dependency'
 0279                           WHEN targetNode <> target THEN 'member'
 0280                           WHEN caller.type IN {{WorkflowAdjacentTypeList}} THEN 'workflow'
 0281                           WHEN last(pathRelationships).type IN ['DependsOn', 'Implements', 'Inherits'] THEN 'dependency
 0282                           ELSE 'direct-class'
 0283                       END AS bucket,
 0284                       CASE
 0285                           WHEN targetNode <> target AND caller.type IN {{WorkflowAdjacentTypeList}} THEN 4
 0286                           WHEN targetNode <> target AND last(pathRelationships).type = 'DependsOn' THEN 3
 0287                           WHEN targetNode <> target THEN 2
 0288                           WHEN caller.type IN {{WorkflowAdjacentTypeList}} THEN 4
 0289                           WHEN last(pathRelationships).type IN ['DependsOn', 'Implements', 'Inherits'] THEN 3
 0290                           ELSE 1
 0291                       END AS bucketRank,
 0292                       CASE
 0293                           WHEN targetNode = target THEN pathNodes
 0294                           ELSE pathNodes + [target]
 0295                       END AS pathNodes,
 0296                       CASE
 0297                           WHEN targetNode = target THEN pathRelationships
 0298                           ELSE pathRelationships + [{ type: 'Contains', confidence: 1.0 }]
 0299                       END AS pathRelationships
 0300
 0301                UNION
 0302
 0303                WITH target, targetType
 0304                WITH target, targetType
 0305                WHERE targetType = 'Interface'
 0306                MATCH (implementer:CodeNode)-[implementationRel:Implements|Inherits]->(target)
 0307                MATCH path = (caller:CodeNode)-[:{{StructuralTraversalRelationships}}*1..8]->(implementer)
 0308                WHERE caller <> target AND caller <> implementer
 0309                WITH target,
 0310                     implementationRel,
 0311                     caller,
 0312                     path,
 0313                     length(path) AS rawDist,
 0314                     [n IN nodes(path) | n] AS pathNodes,
 0315                     [r IN relationships(path) | { type: type(r), confidence: r.confidence }] AS pathRelationships
 0316                ORDER BY caller.id, rawDist ASC
 0317                WITH target,
 0318                     implementationRel,
 0319                     caller,
 0320                     collect({
 0321                         rawDist: rawDist,
 0322                         pathNodes: pathNodes,
 0323                         pathRelationships: pathRelationships
 0324                     })[0] AS best
 0325                RETURN caller,
 0326                       best.rawDist + 1 AS dist,
 0327                       CASE
 0328                           WHEN caller.type IN {{WorkflowAdjacentTypeList}} THEN 'workflow'
 0329                           ELSE 'dependency'
 0330                       END AS bucket,
 0331                       CASE
 0332                           WHEN caller.type IN {{WorkflowAdjacentTypeList}} THEN 4
 0333                           ELSE 3
 0334                       END AS bucketRank,
 0335                       best.pathNodes + [target] AS pathNodes,
 0336                       best.pathRelationships + [{ type: type(implementationRel), confidence: implementationRel.confiden
 0337
 0338                UNION
 0339
 0340                WITH target, targetType
 0341                WITH target, targetType
 0342                WHERE targetType = 'Interface'
 0343                MATCH (implementer:CodeNode)-[implementationRel:Implements|Inherits]->(target)
 0344                MATCH (implementer)-[:Contains*1..2]->(implementerMember:CodeNode)
 0345                MATCH path = (caller:CodeNode)-[:{{StructuralTraversalRelationships}}*1..8]->(implementerMember)
 0346                WHERE caller <> target
 0347                  AND caller <> implementer
 0348                  AND caller <> implementerMember
 0349                WITH target,
 0350                     implementer,
 0351                     implementationRel,
 0352                     caller,
 0353                     path,
 0354                     length(path) AS rawDist,
 0355                     [n IN nodes(path) | n] AS pathNodes,
 0356                     [r IN relationships(path) | { type: type(r), confidence: r.confidence }] AS pathRelationships
 0357                ORDER BY caller.id, rawDist ASC
 0358                WITH target,
 0359                     implementer,
 0360                     implementationRel,
 0361                     caller,
 0362                     collect({
 0363                         rawDist: rawDist,
 0364                         pathNodes: pathNodes,
 0365                         pathRelationships: pathRelationships
 0366                     })[0] AS best
 0367                RETURN caller,
 0368                       best.rawDist + 2 AS dist,
 0369                       CASE
 0370                           WHEN caller.type IN {{WorkflowAdjacentTypeList}} THEN 'workflow'
 0371                           WHEN last(best.pathRelationships).type = 'DependsOn' THEN 'dependency'
 0372                           ELSE 'member'
 0373                       END AS bucket,
 0374                       CASE
 0375                           WHEN caller.type IN {{WorkflowAdjacentTypeList}} THEN 4
 0376                           WHEN last(best.pathRelationships).type = 'DependsOn' THEN 3
 0377                           ELSE 2
 0378                       END AS bucketRank,
 0379                       best.pathNodes + [implementer, target] AS pathNodes,
 0380                       best.pathRelationships + [{ type: 'Contains', confidence: 1.0 }, { type: type(implementationRel),
 0381
 0382                UNION
 0383
 0384                WITH target, targetType
 0385                WITH target, targetType
 0386                WHERE targetType = 'Class'
 0387                MATCH (target)-[implementationRel:Implements|Inherits]->(abstraction:CodeNode)
 0388                MATCH path = (caller:CodeNode)-[:{{StructuralTraversalRelationships}}*1..8]->(abstraction)
 0389                WHERE caller <> target
 0390                  AND caller <> abstraction
 0391                WITH target,
 0392                     implementationRel,
 0393                     caller,
 0394                     path,
 0395                     length(path) AS rawDist,
 0396                     [n IN nodes(path) | n] AS pathNodes,
 0397                     [r IN relationships(path) | { type: type(r), confidence: r.confidence }] AS pathRelationships
 0398                ORDER BY caller.id, rawDist ASC
 0399                WITH target,
 0400                     implementationRel,
 0401                     caller,
 0402                     collect({
 0403                         rawDist: rawDist,
 0404                         pathNodes: pathNodes,
 0405                         pathRelationships: pathRelationships
 0406                     })[0] AS best
 0407                RETURN caller,
 0408                       best.rawDist + 1 AS dist,
 0409                       CASE
 0410                           WHEN caller.type IN {{WorkflowAdjacentTypeList}} THEN 'workflow'
 0411                           ELSE 'dependency'
 0412                       END AS bucket,
 0413                       CASE
 0414                           WHEN caller.type IN {{WorkflowAdjacentTypeList}} THEN 4
 0415                           ELSE 3
 0416                       END AS bucketRank,
 0417                       best.pathNodes + [target] AS pathNodes,
 0418                       best.pathRelationships + [{ type: type(implementationRel), confidence: implementationRel.confiden
 0419
 0420                UNION
 0421
 0422                WITH target, targetType
 0423                WITH target, targetType
 0424                WHERE targetType = 'Class'
 0425                MATCH (target)-[implementationRel:Implements|Inherits]->(abstraction:CodeNode)
 0426                MATCH (abstraction)-[:Contains*1..2]->(abstractionMember:CodeNode)
 0427                MATCH path = (caller:CodeNode)-[:{{StructuralTraversalRelationships}}*1..8]->(abstractionMember)
 0428                WHERE caller <> target
 0429                  AND caller <> abstraction
 0430                  AND caller <> abstractionMember
 0431                WITH target,
 0432                     abstraction,
 0433                     implementationRel,
 0434                     caller,
 0435                     path,
 0436                     length(path) AS rawDist,
 0437                     [n IN nodes(path) | n] AS pathNodes,
 0438                     [r IN relationships(path) | { type: type(r), confidence: r.confidence }] AS pathRelationships
 0439                ORDER BY caller.id, rawDist ASC
 0440                WITH target,
 0441                     abstraction,
 0442                     implementationRel,
 0443                     caller,
 0444                     collect({
 0445                         rawDist: rawDist,
 0446                         pathNodes: pathNodes,
 0447                         pathRelationships: pathRelationships
 0448                     })[0] AS best
 0449                RETURN caller,
 0450                       best.rawDist + 2 AS dist,
 0451                       CASE
 0452                           WHEN caller.type IN {{WorkflowAdjacentTypeList}} THEN 'workflow'
 0453                           ELSE 'dependency'
 0454                       END AS bucket,
 0455                       CASE
 0456                           WHEN caller.type IN {{WorkflowAdjacentTypeList}} THEN 4
 0457                           ELSE 3
 0458                       END AS bucketRank,
 0459                       best.pathNodes + [abstraction, target] AS pathNodes,
 0460                       best.pathRelationships + [{ type: 'Contains', confidence: 1.0 }, { type: type(implementationRel),
 0461            }
 0462            WITH caller, dist, bucket, bucketRank, pathNodes, pathRelationships
 0463            WHERE dist <= $depth
 0464            ORDER BY caller.id, bucketRank ASC, dist ASC
 0465            WITH caller, collect({
 0466                dist: dist,
 0467                bucket: bucket,
 0468                bucketRank: bucketRank,
 0469                pathNodes: pathNodes,
 0470                pathRelationships: pathRelationships
 0471            })[0] AS best
 0472            RETURN caller,
 0473                   best.dist AS dist,
 0474                   best.bucket AS bucket,
 0475                   best.bucketRank AS bucketRank,
 0476                   best.pathNodes AS pathNodes,
 0477                   best.pathRelationships AS pathRelationships
 0478            ORDER BY dist ASC, bucketRank ASC, caller.name
 0479            LIMIT 50
 0480            """;
 481
 0482        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new { nodeId, depth = maxDepth });
 0483        var results = new List<ImpactPath>();
 484
 0485        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 486        {
 0487            var caller = AnnotateImpactEvidenceNode(
 0488                MapToCodeNode(record["caller"].As<INode>()),
 0489                record["bucket"].As<string>());
 0490            var dist = record["dist"].As<int>();
 0491            var pathNodes = record["pathNodes"].As<List<INode>>();
 0492            var pathRelationships = record["pathRelationships"].As<List<object>>();
 0493            var steps = MapImpactPathSteps(pathNodes, pathRelationships, caller);
 494
 0495            results.Add(new ImpactPath(caller, dist, steps));
 496        }
 497
 0498        return results;
 0499    }
 500
 501    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Node, int Distance)>> FindDownstreamAsync(
 502        string nodeId,
 503        int depth = 5,
 504        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 505    {
 0506        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 507
 0508        var cypher = $$"""
 0509            MATCH (source:CodeNode {id: $nodeId})
 0510            OPTIONAL MATCH (source)-[:Contains*0..2]->(sourceMember:CodeNode)
 0511            WITH collect(DISTINCT source) + collect(DISTINCT sourceMember) AS sources
 0512            UNWIND sources AS sourceNode
 0513            WITH DISTINCT sourceNode, sources
 0514            WHERE sourceNode IS NOT NULL
 0515            MATCH path = (sourceNode)-[:{{StructuralTraversalRelationships}}*1..{{depth}}]->(downstream:CodeNode)
 0516            WHERE none(source IN sources WHERE source = downstream)
 0517            WITH downstream, min(length(path)) AS dist
 0518            RETURN downstream, dist
 0519            ORDER BY dist ASC
 0520            LIMIT 50
 0521            """;
 522
 0523        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new { nodeId });
 0524        var results = new List<(CodeNode, int)>();
 525
 0526        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 0527            results.Add((MapToCodeNode(record["downstream"].As<INode>()), record["dist"].As<int>()));
 528
 0529        return results;
 0530    }
 531
 532    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Node, int FanIn)>> FindHotspotsAsync(
 533        string? projectContext,
 534        int limit = 15,
 535        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 536    {
 0537        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 538
 0539        var cypher = $"""
 0540            MATCH (caller:CodeNode)-[:{StructuralDependencyRelationships}]->(n:CodeNode)
 0541            WHERE ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 0542              AND n.type IN ['Method', 'Class', 'Interface']
 0543            RETURN n, count(caller) AS fanIn
 0544            ORDER BY fanIn DESC
 0545            LIMIT $limit
 0546            """;
 547
 0548        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new
 0549        {
 0550            projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext),
 0551            limit
 0552        });
 553
 0554        var results = new List<(CodeNode, int)>();
 555
 0556        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 0557            results.Add((MapToCodeNode(record["n"].As<INode>()), record["fanIn"].As<int>()));
 558
 0559        return results;
 0560    }
 561
 562    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Node, string? ViaRelationship)>> FindConnectionAsync(
 563        string fromId,
 564        string toId,
 565        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 566    {
 0567        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 568
 0569        var cypher =
 0570            "MATCH path = shortestPath(" +
 0571            "(a:CodeNode {id: $fromId})-[:"
 0572            + ConnectionRelationships +
 0573            "*..10]-(b:CodeNode {id: $toId})) " +
 0574            "RETURN [n IN nodes(path) | n] AS pathNodes, " +
 0575            "[r IN relationships(path) | type(r)] AS relTypes";
 576
 0577        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new { fromId, toId });
 0578        var records = await cursor.ToListAsync();
 579
 0580        if (records.Count == 0) return [];
 581
 0582        var record = records[0];
 0583        var pathNodes = record["pathNodes"].As<List<INode>>();
 0584        var relTypes = record["relTypes"].As<List<string>>();
 585
 0586        var result = new List<(CodeNode, string?)>();
 0587        for (var i = 0; i < pathNodes.Count; i++)
 588        {
 0589            var via = i < relTypes.Count ? relTypes[i] : null;
 0590            result.Add((MapToCodeNode(pathNodes[i]), via));
 591        }
 592
 0593        return result;
 0594    }
 595
 596    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<CodeNode>> FindUnreferencedAsync(
 597        string? projectContext,
 598        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 599    {
 0600        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 601
 0602        var cypher = $"""
 0603            MATCH (n:CodeNode)
 0604            WHERE n.type IN ['Method', 'Class']
 0605              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 0606              AND NOT ()-[:{StructuralDependencyRelationships}|Contains]->(n)
 0607            RETURN n
 0608            ORDER BY n.type, n.name
 0609            LIMIT 100
 0610            """;
 611
 0612        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new { projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext) 
 0613        var results = new List<CodeNode>();
 614
 0615        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 0616            results.Add(MapToCodeNode(record["n"].As<INode>()));
 617
 0618        return results;
 0619    }
 620
 621    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<CodeNode>> FindLargeNodesAsync(
 622        string? projectContext = null,
 623        int classThreshold = 400,
 624        int methodThreshold = 40,
 625        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 626    {
 0627        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 628
 0629        var fileRole = FileRoleExpression("n");
 0630        var cypher = $@"
 0631            MATCH (n:CodeNode)
 0632            WHERE n.lineCount IS NOT NULL
 0633              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 0634              AND (
 0635                (n.type = 'Class' AND n.lineCount > $classThreshold) OR
 0636                (n.type = 'Method' AND n.lineCount > $methodThreshold)
 0637              )
 0638              AND {fileRole} IN ['Source', 'Unknown']
 0639            RETURN n
 0640            ORDER BY n.lineCount DESC
 0641            LIMIT 50
 0642            ";
 643
 0644        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new
 0645        {
 0646            projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext),
 0647            classThreshold,
 0648            methodThreshold
 0649        });
 650
 0651        var results = new List<CodeNode>();
 0652        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 0653            results.Add(MapToCodeNode(record["n"].As<INode>()));
 654
 0655        return results;
 0656    }
 657
 658    public async Task<EditingContext> GetContextForEditingAsync(
 659        string nodeId,
 660        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 661    {
 0662        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 663
 0664        var cypher =
 0665            "MATCH (n:CodeNode {id: $nodeId}) " +
 0666            "OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[:Contains*0..2]->(member:CodeNode) " +
 0667            "WITH n, [candidate IN collect(DISTINCT member) WHERE candidate IS NOT NULL] AS collectedMembers " +
 0668            "WITH n, CASE WHEN size(collectedMembers) = 0 THEN [n] ELSE collectedMembers END AS members " +
 0669            "UNWIND members AS callerTarget " +
 0670            "OPTIONAL MATCH (caller:CodeNode)-[:"
 0671            + StructuralTraversalRelationships +
 0672            "]->(callerTarget) " +
 0673            "WITH n, members, collect(DISTINCT caller)[..10] AS callers " +
 0674            "UNWIND members AS calleeSource " +
 0675            "OPTIONAL MATCH (calleeSource)-[:"
 0676            + StructuralTraversalRelationships +
 0677            "]->(callee:CodeNode) " +
 0678            "WITH n, callers, collect(DISTINCT callee)[..10] AS callees " +
 0679            "OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[:Implements]->(iface:CodeNode) " +
 0680            "WITH n, callers, callees, collect(DISTINCT iface)[..10] AS interfaces " +
 0681            "RETURN n, callers, callees, interfaces";
 682
 0683        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new { nodeId });
 0684        var records = await cursor.ToListAsync();
 685
 0686        if (records.Count == 0)
 0687            return new EditingContext(null, [], [], []);
 688
 0689        var record = records[0];
 0690        var node = record["n"].As<INode?>();
 0691        var callers = record["callers"].As<List<INode>>().Select(MapToCodeNode).ToList();
 0692        var callees = record["callees"].As<List<INode>>().Select(MapToCodeNode).ToList();
 0693        var interfaces = record["interfaces"].As<List<INode>>().Select(MapToCodeNode).ToList();
 694
 0695        return new EditingContext(
 0696            node is null ? null : MapToCodeNode(node),
 0697            callers,
 0698            callees,
 0699            interfaces);
 0700    }
 701
 702    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Node, int LineCount, int FanIn)>> FindGodClassesAsync(
 703        string? projectContext = null,
 704        int lineThreshold = 300,
 705        int fanInThreshold = 3,
 706        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 707    {
 0708        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 709
 0710        var fileRole = FileRoleExpression("n");
 0711        var cypher = $@"
 0712            MATCH (n:CodeNode)
 0713            WHERE n.type = 'Class'
 0714              AND n.lineCount IS NOT NULL
 0715              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 0716              AND n.lineCount > $lineThreshold
 0717              AND {fileRole} IN ['Source', 'Unknown']
 0718            CALL {{
 0719                WITH n
 0720                MATCH (caller:CodeNode)-[rel:{StructuralTraversalRelationships}]->(n)
 0721                WHERE caller <> n
 0722                RETURN caller,
 0723                       CASE
 0724                           WHEN caller.type IN {WorkflowAdjacentTypeList} THEN 'workflow'
 0725                           WHEN type(rel) IN ['DependsOn', 'Implements', 'Inherits'] THEN 'dependency'
 0726                           ELSE 'direct-class'
 0727                       END AS bucket,
 0728                       CASE
 0729                           WHEN caller.type IN {WorkflowAdjacentTypeList} THEN 4
 0730                           WHEN type(rel) IN ['DependsOn', 'Implements', 'Inherits'] THEN 3
 0731                           ELSE 1
 0732                       END AS bucketRank
 0733                UNION
 0734                WITH n
 0735                MATCH (n)-[:Contains*1..2]->(member:CodeNode)<-[rel:{StructuralDependencyRelationships}]-(caller:CodeNod
 0736                WHERE caller <> n AND caller <> member
 0737                RETURN caller,
 0738                       CASE
 0739                           WHEN caller.type IN {WorkflowAdjacentTypeList} THEN 'workflow'
 0740                           WHEN type(rel) = 'DependsOn' THEN 'dependency'
 0741                           ELSE 'member'
 0742                       END AS bucket,
 0743                       CASE
 0744                           WHEN caller.type IN {WorkflowAdjacentTypeList} THEN 4
 0745                           WHEN type(rel) = 'DependsOn' THEN 3
 0746                           ELSE 2
 0747                       END AS bucketRank
 0748            }}
 0749            WITH n, n.lineCount AS lineCount, caller, bucket, bucketRank
 0750            WHERE caller IS NOT NULL
 0751            ORDER BY caller.id, bucketRank ASC
 0752            WITH n, lineCount, caller, collect({{ bucket: bucket, bucketRank: bucketRank }})[0] AS best
 0753            WITH n,
 0754                 lineCount,
 0755                 count(DISTINCT caller) AS fanIn,
 0756                 count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN best.bucket = 'direct-class' THEN caller END) AS directCallerCount,
 0757                 count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN best.bucket = 'member' THEN caller END) AS memberCallerCount,
 0758                 count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN best.bucket = 'dependency' THEN caller END) AS dependencyCallerCount,
 0759                 count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN best.bucket = 'workflow' THEN caller END) AS heuristicCallerCount
 0760            WHERE fanIn > $fanInThreshold
 0761            WITH n,
 0762                 lineCount,
 0763                 fanIn,
 0764                 directCallerCount,
 0765                 memberCallerCount,
 0766                 dependencyCallerCount,
 0767                 heuristicCallerCount,
 0768                 (directCallerCount * 4 + memberCallerCount * 3 + dependencyCallerCount * 2 + heuristicCallerCount) AS q
 0769            RETURN n,
 0770                   lineCount,
 0771                   fanIn,
 0772                   directCallerCount,
 0773                   memberCallerCount,
 0774                   dependencyCallerCount,
 0775                   heuristicCallerCount,
 0776                   qualityScore
 0777            ORDER BY qualityScore DESC, lineCount DESC, fanIn DESC, n.name
 0778            LIMIT 20
 0779            ";
 780
 0781        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new
 0782        {
 0783            projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext),
 0784            lineThreshold,
 0785            fanInThreshold
 0786        });
 787
 0788        var results = new List<(CodeNode, int, int)>();
 0789        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 790        {
 0791            var node = AnnotateGodClassNode(
 0792                MapToCodeNode(record["n"].As<INode>()),
 0793                record["directCallerCount"].As<int>(),
 0794                record["memberCallerCount"].As<int>(),
 0795                record["dependencyCallerCount"].As<int>(),
 0796                record["heuristicCallerCount"].As<int>(),
 0797                record["qualityScore"].As<int>());
 0798            results.Add((
 0799                node,
 0800                record["lineCount"].As<int>(),
 0801                record["fanIn"].As<int>()));
 802        }
 803
 0804        return results;
 0805    }
 806
 807    private static CodeNode AnnotateImpactEvidenceNode(CodeNode node, string bucket)
 808    {
 0809        var properties = new Dictionary<string, string>(node.Properties, StringComparer.Ordinal)
 0810        {
 0811            ["impactEvidenceBucket"] = bucket
 0812        };
 813
 0814        return node with { Properties = properties };
 815    }
 816
 817    private static List<GraphPathStep> MapImpactPathSteps(
 818        List<INode> pathNodes,
 819        List<object> pathRelationships,
 820        CodeNode? annotatedCaller = null)
 821    {
 0822        var steps = new List<GraphPathStep>(pathNodes.Count);
 823
 0824        for (var i = 0; i < pathNodes.Count; i++)
 825        {
 0826            string? relationshipType = null;
 0827            double? relationshipConfidence = null;
 828
 0829            if (i < pathRelationships.Count && pathRelationships[i] is IDictionary<string, object> rel)
 830            {
 0831                relationshipType = rel.TryGetValue("type", out var typeValue)
 0832                    ? typeValue?.ToString()
 0833                    : null;
 834
 0835                if (rel.TryGetValue("confidence", out var confidenceValue) && confidenceValue is not null)
 836                {
 0837                    relationshipConfidence = confidenceValue switch
 0838                    {
 0839                        double d => d,
 0840                        float f => f,
 0841                        long l => l,
 0842                        int n => n,
 0843                        _ when double.TryParse(confidenceValue.ToString(), out var parsed) => parsed,
 0844                        _ => null
 0845                    };
 846                }
 847            }
 848
 0849            var node = i == 0 && annotatedCaller is not null
 0850                ? annotatedCaller
 0851                : MapToCodeNode(pathNodes[i]);
 852
 0853            steps.Add(new GraphPathStep(
 0854                node,
 0855                relationshipType,
 0856                relationshipConfidence));
 857        }
 858
 0859        return steps;
 860    }
 861
 862    private static CodeNode AnnotateGodClassNode(
 863        CodeNode node,
 864        int directCallerCount,
 865        int memberCallerCount,
 866        int dependencyCallerCount,
 867        int heuristicCallerCount,
 868        int qualityScore)
 869    {
 0870        var properties = new Dictionary<string, string>(node.Properties, StringComparer.Ordinal)
 0871        {
 0872            ["godClassDirectCallerCount"] = directCallerCount.ToString(),
 0873            ["godClassMemberCallerCount"] = memberCallerCount.ToString(),
 0874            ["godClassDependencyCallerCount"] = dependencyCallerCount.ToString(),
 0875            ["godClassHeuristicCallerCount"] = heuristicCallerCount.ToString(),
 0876            ["godClassQualityScore"] = qualityScore.ToString()
 0877        };
 878
 0879        return node with { Properties = properties };
 880    }
 881
 882    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(string FromNamespace, string ToNamespace)>> FindCyclesAsync(
 883        string? projectContext = null,
 884        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 885    {
 0886        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 887
 888        // Detect namespace-level bidirectional dependencies (A→B and B→A)
 889        const string cypher = """
 890            MATCH (a:CodeNode)-[:Calls|Uses|DependsOn]->(b:CodeNode)
 891            WHERE a.namespace IS NOT NULL
 892              AND b.namespace IS NOT NULL
 893              AND a.namespace <> b.namespace
 894              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR a.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 895            WITH DISTINCT a.namespace AS nsA, b.namespace AS nsB
 896            MATCH (c:CodeNode)-[:Calls|Uses|DependsOn]->(d:CodeNode)
 897            WHERE c.namespace = nsB AND d.namespace = nsA
 898              AND c.namespace <> d.namespace
 899            RETURN DISTINCT nsA AS fromNamespace, nsB AS toNamespace
 900            ORDER BY fromNamespace, toNamespace
 901            LIMIT 50
 902            """;
 903
 0904        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new { projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext) 
 0905        var results = new List<(string, string)>();
 906
 0907        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 0908            results.Add((record["fromNamespace"].As<string>(), record["toNamespace"].As<string>()));
 909
 0910        return results;
 0911    }
 912
 913    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Source, CodeNode Target, string Violation)>> FindArchitectureViolationsAsy
 914        string? projectContext = null,
 915        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 916    {
 0917        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 0918        var architecture = await LoadArchitectureRulesAsync(session, projectContext, cancellationToken);
 0919        var ruleCypher = BuildArchitectureRuleCypher(architecture);
 0920        var cypher = $"""
 0921            MATCH (source:CodeNode)-[:Calls|Uses|DependsOn]->(target:CodeNode)
 0922            WHERE ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR source.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 0923              AND source.namespace IS NOT NULL
 0924              AND target.namespace IS NOT NULL
 0925              AND ({ruleCypher.WhereClause})
 0926            WITH source, target,
 0927                 CASE
 0928                 {ruleCypher.CaseClause}
 0929                   ELSE source.namespace + ' → ' + target.namespace
 0930                 END AS violation
 0931            RETURN source, target, violation
 0932            ORDER BY violation, source.name, target.name
 0933            LIMIT 50
 0934            """;
 935
 0936        var parameters = ruleCypher.Parameters;
 0937        parameters["projectContextNormalized"] = Normalize(projectContext);
 0938        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, parameters);
 0939        var results = new List<(CodeNode, CodeNode, string)>();
 940
 0941        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 942        {
 0943            results.Add((
 0944                MapToCodeNode(record["source"].As<INode>()),
 0945                MapToCodeNode(record["target"].As<INode>()),
 0946                record["violation"].As<string>()));
 947        }
 948
 0949        return results;
 0950    }
 951
 952    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<DependencySmellPath>> FindSmellPathsAsync(
 953        string? projectContext = null,
 954        int maxDepth = 4,
 955        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 956    {
 0957        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 0958        var architecture = await LoadArchitectureRulesAsync(session, projectContext, cancellationToken);
 0959        var ruleCypher = BuildArchitectureRuleCypher(architecture);
 960
 0961        var sourceRole = FileRoleExpression("source");
 0962        var targetRole = FileRoleExpression("target");
 0963        var cypher = $$"""
 0964            MATCH path = (source:CodeNode)-[:Calls|Uses|DependsOn*1..{{Math.Clamp(maxDepth, 1, 6)}}]->(target:CodeNode)
 0965            WHERE ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR source.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 0966              AND source <> target
 0967              AND source.namespace IS NOT NULL
 0968              AND target.namespace IS NOT NULL
 0969              AND {{sourceRole}} IN ['Source', 'Unknown']
 0970              AND {{targetRole}} IN ['Source', 'Unknown']
 0971              AND ({{ruleCypher.WhereClause}})
 0972            WITH source, target, path, length(path) AS dist,
 0973                 CASE
 0974                   WHEN source.namespace CONTAINS 'Core' AND target.namespace CONTAINS 'Infrastructure' THEN 'Core → Inf
 0975                   WHEN source.namespace CONTAINS 'Core' AND target.namespace CONTAINS 'McpServer' THEN 'Core → Presenta
 0976                   WHEN source.namespace CONTAINS 'Core' AND target.namespace CONTAINS 'Application' THEN 'Core → Applic
 0977                   WHEN source.namespace CONTAINS 'Application' AND target.namespace CONTAINS 'Infrastructure' THEN 'App
 0978                   WHEN source.namespace CONTAINS 'Application' AND target.namespace CONTAINS 'McpServer' THEN 'Applicat
 0979                   ELSE 'Presentation → Infrastructure'
 0980                 END AS violation
 0981            WITH source, target, path, dist,
 0982                 CASE
 0983                 {{ruleCypher.CaseClause}}
 0984                   ELSE violation
 0985                 END AS violation
 0986            ORDER BY violation, source.id, target.id, dist ASC
 0987            WITH violation, source, target, collect(path)[0] AS shortestPath, min(dist) AS dist
 0988            RETURN violation,
 0989                   source,
 0990                   target,
 0991                   dist,
 0992                   [n IN nodes(shortestPath) | n] AS pathNodes,
 0993                   [r IN relationships(shortestPath) | { type: type(r), confidence: r.confidence }] AS pathRelationships
 0994            ORDER BY dist ASC, violation, source.name, target.name
 0995            LIMIT 50
 0996            """;
 997
 0998        var parameters = ruleCypher.Parameters;
 0999        parameters["projectContextNormalized"] = Normalize(projectContext);
 01000        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, parameters);
 1001
 01002        var results = new List<DependencySmellPath>();
 1003
 01004        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 1005        {
 01006            var source = MapToCodeNode(record["source"].As<INode>());
 01007            var target = MapToCodeNode(record["target"].As<INode>());
 01008            var dist = record["dist"].As<int>();
 01009            var pathNodes = record["pathNodes"].As<List<INode>>();
 01010            var pathRelationships = record["pathRelationships"].As<List<object>>();
 01011            var steps = new List<GraphPathStep>(pathNodes.Count);
 1012
 01013            for (var i = 0; i < pathNodes.Count; i++)
 1014            {
 01015                string? relationshipType = null;
 01016                double? relationshipConfidence = null;
 1017
 01018                if (i < pathRelationships.Count && pathRelationships[i] is IDictionary<string, object> rel)
 1019                {
 01020                    relationshipType = rel.TryGetValue("type", out var typeValue)
 01021                        ? typeValue?.ToString()
 01022                        : null;
 1023
 01024                    if (rel.TryGetValue("confidence", out var confidenceValue) && confidenceValue is not null)
 1025                    {
 01026                        relationshipConfidence = confidenceValue switch
 01027                        {
 01028                            double d => d,
 01029                            float f => f,
 01030                            long l => l,
 01031                            int n => n,
 01032                            _ when double.TryParse(confidenceValue.ToString(), out var parsed) => parsed,
 01033                            _ => null
 01034                        };
 1035                    }
 1036                }
 1037
 01038                steps.Add(new GraphPathStep(
 01039                    MapToCodeNode(pathNodes[i]),
 01040                    relationshipType,
 01041                    relationshipConfidence));
 1042            }
 1043
 01044            results.Add(new DependencySmellPath(
 01045                record["violation"].As<string>(),
 01046                source,
 01047                target,
 01048                dist,
 01049                steps));
 1050        }
 1051
 01052        return results;
 01053    }
 1054
 1055    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Node, int ChangeCount)>> FindHighChurnAsync(
 1056        string? projectContext = null,
 1057        int threshold = 3,
 1058        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 1059    {
 01060        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 1061
 1062        const string cypher = """
 1063            MATCH (n:CodeNode)
 1064            WHERE n.changeCount IS NOT NULL
 1065              AND n.changeCount >= $threshold
 1066              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 1067            WITH n,
 1068                 CASE WHEN n.type = 'Namespace' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS namespaceRank,
 1069                 CASE
 1070                   WHEN coalesce(n.namespaceNormalized CONTAINS 'test', false) THEN 1
 1071                   WHEN coalesce(n.filePathNormalized CONTAINS 'test', false) THEN 1
 1072                   ELSE 0
 1073                 END AS testRank
 1074            RETURN n, n.changeCount AS changeCount
 1075            ORDER BY testRank ASC, namespaceRank ASC, changeCount DESC, coalesce(n.lineCount, 0) DESC, n.name
 1076            LIMIT 50
 1077            """;
 1078
 01079        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new
 01080        {
 01081            projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext),
 01082            threshold
 01083        });
 1084
 01085        var results = new List<(CodeNode, int)>();
 1086
 01087        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 01088            results.Add((MapToCodeNode(record["n"].As<INode>()), record["changeCount"].As<int>()));
 1089
 01090        return results;
 01091    }
 1092}

/home/runner/work/code-meridian/code-meridian/src/Infrastructure/Graph/Neo4jCodeGraphRepository.Architecture.cs

#LineLine coverage
 1using CodeMeridian.Core.CodeGraph;
 2using Neo4j.Driver;
 3
 4namespace CodeMeridian.Infrastructure.Graph;
 5
 6public sealed partial class Neo4jCodeGraphRepository
 7{
 8    private const string DefaultArchitectureFilePath = ".meridian/architecture.json";
 9
 010    private static readonly ArchitectureRuleSet DefaultArchitectureRules = new(
 011        "Clean Architecture",
 012        [
 013            new ArchitectureLayerDefinition("Core", [".Core", ".Domain"]),
 014            new ArchitectureLayerDefinition("Application", [".Application"]),
 015            new ArchitectureLayerDefinition("Infrastructure", [".Infrastructure", ".Persistence"]),
 016            new ArchitectureLayerDefinition("Presentation", [".Api", ".Web", ".UI", ".McpServer"])
 017        ],
 018        [
 019            new ArchitectureForbiddenDependencyRule("Core", "Application", "Core must not depend on Application"),
 020            new ArchitectureForbiddenDependencyRule("Core", "Infrastructure", "Core must not depend on Infrastructure"),
 021            new ArchitectureForbiddenDependencyRule("Core", "Presentation", "Core must not depend on Presentation"),
 022            new ArchitectureForbiddenDependencyRule("Application", "Infrastructure", "Application must not depend on Inf
 023            new ArchitectureForbiddenDependencyRule("Application", "Presentation", "Application must not depend on Prese
 024        ]);
 25
 26    private async Task<ArchitectureRuleSet> LoadArchitectureRulesAsync(
 27        IAsyncSession session,
 28        string? projectContext,
 29        CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 30    {
 031        var activeArchitecturePath = await LoadActiveArchitecturePathAsync(session, projectContext, cancellationToken)
 032            ?? DefaultArchitectureFilePath;
 033        var entries = await LoadConfigurationEntriesForFileAsync(session, activeArchitecturePath, projectContext, cancel
 034        return ParseArchitectureRuleSet(entries) ?? DefaultArchitectureRules;
 035    }
 36
 37    private async Task<string?> LoadActiveArchitecturePathAsync(
 38        IAsyncSession session,
 39        string? projectContext,
 40        CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 41    {
 42        const string cypher = """
 43            MATCH (key:CodeNode)
 44            WHERE key.type = 'ConfigurationKey'
 45              AND key.nameNormalized = 'architecture:path'
 46              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR key.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 47            MATCH (entry:CodeNode)-[keyRel:DefinesConfig|OverridesConfig]->(key)
 48            MATCH (file:CodeNode)-[:DefinesConfig]->(entry)
 49            WHERE file.type = 'ConfigurationFile'
 50            RETURN coalesce(keyRel.valuePreview, entry.rawValuePreview) AS valuePreview,
 51                   file.filePath AS filePath,
 52                   CASE WHEN file.filePathNormalized = 'meridian.json' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS fileRank,
 53                   CASE WHEN type(keyRel) = 'OverridesConfig' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS relationshipRank
 54            ORDER BY relationshipRank ASC, fileRank ASC, file.filePath ASC
 55            LIMIT 1
 56            """;
 57
 058        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new
 059        {
 060            projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext)
 061        });
 62
 063        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 64        {
 065            var value = record["valuePreview"].As<string?>();
 066            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
 067                return value.Replace('\\', '/');
 68        }
 69
 070        return null;
 071    }
 72
 73    private async Task<IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string>> LoadConfigurationEntriesForFileAsync(
 74        IAsyncSession session,
 75        string relativePath,
 76        string? projectContext,
 77        CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 78    {
 79        const string cypher = """
 80            MATCH (file:CodeNode)
 81            WHERE file.type = 'ConfigurationFile'
 82              AND file.filePathNormalized = $filePathNormalized
 83              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR file.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 84            MATCH (file)-[:DefinesConfig]->(entry:CodeNode)
 85            WHERE entry.type = 'ConfigurationEntry'
 86            RETURN coalesce(entry.canonicalKey, entry.name) AS canonicalKey,
 87                   coalesce(entry.rawValuePreview, '') AS valuePreview
 88            ORDER BY canonicalKey
 89            LIMIT 500
 90            """;
 91
 092        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new
 093        {
 094            filePathNormalized = Normalize(relativePath),
 095            projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext)
 096        });
 97
 098        var entries = new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
 099        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 100        {
 0101            var key = record["canonicalKey"].As<string?>();
 0102            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(key))
 103                continue;
 104
 0105            entries[key] = record["valuePreview"].As<string?>() ?? string.Empty;
 106        }
 107
 0108        return entries;
 0109    }
 110
 111    private static ArchitectureRuleSet? ParseArchitectureRuleSet(IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string> entries)
 112    {
 0113        if (entries.Count == 0)
 0114            return null;
 115
 0116        var name = entries.TryGetValue("name", out var configuredName) && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(configuredName)
 0117            ? configuredName
 0118            : "Configured Architecture";
 119
 0120        var layerEntries = GroupIndexedEntries(entries, "layers");
 0121        var layers = layerEntries
 0122            .OrderBy(entry => entry.Key)
 0123            .Select(entry =>
 0124            {
 0125                var id = entry.Value.TryGetValue("id", out var layerId) ? layerId : string.Empty;
 0126                var patterns = CollectIndexedValues(entry.Value, "namespaceContainsAny");
 0127                return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(id) || patterns.Count == 0
 0128                    ? null
 0129                    : new ArchitectureLayerDefinition(id, patterns);
 0130            })
 0131            .Where(layer => layer is not null)
 0132            .Cast<ArchitectureLayerDefinition>()
 0133            .ToArray();
 134
 0135        if (layers.Length == 0)
 0136            return null;
 137
 0138        var layersById = layers.ToDictionary(layer => layer.Id, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
 0139        var ruleEntries = GroupIndexedEntries(entries, "forbiddenDependencies");
 0140        var rules = ruleEntries
 0141            .OrderBy(entry => entry.Key)
 0142            .Select(entry =>
 0143            {
 0144                var values = entry.Value;
 0145                var from = values.TryGetValue("from", out var fromLayer) ? fromLayer : string.Empty;
 0146                var to = values.TryGetValue("to", out var toLayer) ? toLayer : string.Empty;
 0147                var reason = values.TryGetValue("reason", out var configuredReason) && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(config
 0148                    ? configuredReason
 0149                    : $"{from} must not depend on {to}";
 0150
 0151                return !layersById.ContainsKey(from) || !layersById.ContainsKey(to)
 0152                    ? null
 0153                    : new ArchitectureForbiddenDependencyRule(from, to, reason);
 0154            })
 0155            .Where(rule => rule is not null)
 0156            .Cast<ArchitectureForbiddenDependencyRule>()
 0157            .ToArray();
 158
 0159        return rules.Length == 0
 0160            ? null
 0161            : new ArchitectureRuleSet(name, layers, rules);
 162    }
 163
 164    private static Dictionary<int, Dictionary<string, string>> GroupIndexedEntries(
 165        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string> entries,
 166        string rootKey)
 167    {
 0168        var groups = new Dictionary<int, Dictionary<string, string>>();
 0169        var prefix = $"{rootKey}:";
 170
 0171        foreach (var (key, value) in entries)
 172        {
 0173            if (!key.StartsWith(prefix, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
 174                continue;
 175
 0176            var remainder = key[prefix.Length..];
 0177            var separatorIndex = remainder.IndexOf(':');
 0178            if (separatorIndex <= 0)
 179                continue;
 180
 0181            if (!int.TryParse(remainder[..separatorIndex], out var index))
 182                continue;
 183
 0184            var childKey = remainder[(separatorIndex + 1)..];
 0185            if (!groups.TryGetValue(index, out var group))
 186            {
 0187                group = new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
 0188                groups[index] = group;
 189            }
 190
 0191            group[childKey] = value;
 192        }
 193
 0194        return groups;
 195    }
 196
 197    private static List<string> CollectIndexedValues(
 198        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string> values,
 199        string keyPrefix)
 200    {
 0201        return values
 0202            .Where(entry => entry.Key.StartsWith($"{keyPrefix}:", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
 0203            .Select(entry =>
 0204            {
 0205                var suffix = entry.Key[(keyPrefix.Length + 1)..];
 0206                return int.TryParse(suffix, out var index)
 0207                    ? (Index: index, Value: entry.Value)
 0208                    : (Index: int.MaxValue, Value: entry.Value);
 0209            })
 0210            .OrderBy(entry => entry.Index)
 0211            .Select(entry => entry.Value)
 0212            .Where(value => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
 0213            .Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
 0214            .ToList();
 215    }
 216
 217    private static (string WhereClause, string CaseClause, Dictionary<string, object?> Parameters) BuildArchitectureRule
 218        ArchitectureRuleSet architecture)
 219    {
 0220        var parameters = new Dictionary<string, object?>(StringComparer.Ordinal);
 0221        var layers = architecture.Layers.ToDictionary(layer => layer.Id, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
 0222        var whereBranches = new List<string>();
 0223        var caseBranches = new List<string>();
 0224        var ruleIndex = 0;
 225
 0226        foreach (var rule in architecture.ForbiddenDependencies)
 227        {
 0228            if (!layers.TryGetValue(rule.FromLayerId, out var sourceLayer)
 0229                || !layers.TryGetValue(rule.ToLayerId, out var targetLayer)
 0230                || sourceLayer.NamespaceContainsAny.Count == 0
 0231                || targetLayer.NamespaceContainsAny.Count == 0)
 232            {
 233                continue;
 234            }
 235
 0236            var sourceParam = $"sourcePatterns{ruleIndex}";
 0237            var targetParam = $"targetPatterns{ruleIndex}";
 0238            var reasonParam = $"ruleReason{ruleIndex}";
 0239            var branch = $"(any(token IN ${sourceParam} WHERE source.namespace CONTAINS token) AND any(token IN ${target
 240
 0241            parameters[sourceParam] = sourceLayer.NamespaceContainsAny.ToArray();
 0242            parameters[targetParam] = targetLayer.NamespaceContainsAny.ToArray();
 0243            parameters[reasonParam] = rule.Reason;
 0244            whereBranches.Add(branch);
 0245            caseBranches.Add($"WHEN {branch} THEN ${reasonParam}");
 0246            ruleIndex++;
 247        }
 248
 0249        if (whereBranches.Count == 0)
 250        {
 0251            return (
 0252                "false",
 0253                "WHEN false THEN 'No architecture rules configured'",
 0254                parameters);
 255        }
 256
 0257        return (
 0258            string.Join(" OR ", whereBranches),
 0259            string.Join(Environment.NewLine + "                 ", caseBranches),
 0260            parameters);
 261    }
 262}

/home/runner/work/code-meridian/code-meridian/src/Infrastructure/Graph/Neo4jCodeGraphRepository.Configuration.cs

#LineLine coverage
 1using CodeMeridian.Core.CodeGraph;
 2using Neo4j.Driver;
 3
 4namespace CodeMeridian.Infrastructure.Graph;
 5
 6public sealed partial class Neo4jCodeGraphRepository
 7{
 8    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<ConfigurationDefinition>> FindConfigDefinitionsAsync(
 9        string canonicalKey,
 10        string? projectContext = null,
 11        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 12    {
 013        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 14
 15        const string cypher = """
 16            MATCH (key:CodeNode)
 17            WHERE key.type = 'ConfigurationKey'
 18              AND key.nameNormalized = $canonicalKeyNormalized
 19              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR key.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 20            MATCH (entry:CodeNode)-[keyRel:DefinesConfig|OverridesConfig]->(key)
 21            WHERE entry.type = 'ConfigurationEntry'
 22            MATCH (file:CodeNode)-[:DefinesConfig]->(entry)
 23            WHERE file.type = 'ConfigurationFile'
 24            RETURN file, entry, key, type(keyRel) AS relationshipType,
 25                   coalesce(keyRel.rawKey, entry.rawKey) AS rawKey,
 26                   coalesce(keyRel.sourceKind, entry.sourceKind) AS sourceKind,
 27                   coalesce(keyRel.valuePreview, entry.rawValuePreview) AS valuePreview
 28            ORDER BY file.filePath, entry.name
 29            LIMIT 100
 30            """;
 31
 032        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new
 033        {
 034            canonicalKeyNormalized = Normalize(canonicalKey),
 035            projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext)
 036        });
 37
 038        var results = new List<ConfigurationDefinition>();
 039        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 40        {
 041            results.Add(new ConfigurationDefinition
 042            {
 043                FileNode = MapToCodeNode(record["file"].As<INode>()),
 044                EntryNode = MapToCodeNode(record["entry"].As<INode>()),
 045                KeyNode = MapToCodeNode(record["key"].As<INode>()),
 046                RelationshipType = record["relationshipType"].As<string>(),
 047                RawKey = record["rawKey"].As<string?>(),
 048                SourceKind = record["sourceKind"].As<string?>(),
 049                ValuePreview = record["valuePreview"].As<string?>()
 050            });
 51        }
 52
 053        return results;
 054    }
 55
 56    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<ConfigurationUsage>> FindConfigUsageAsync(
 57        string canonicalKey,
 58        string? projectContext = null,
 59        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 60    {
 061        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 62
 63        const string cypher = """
 64            MATCH (consumer:CodeNode)-[rel:ReadsConfig|BindsConfig]->(key:CodeNode)
 65            WHERE key.type = 'ConfigurationKey'
 66              AND key.nameNormalized = $canonicalKeyNormalized
 67              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL
 68                   OR consumer.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized
 69                   OR key.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 70            RETURN consumer, key, type(rel) AS relationshipType,
 71                   rel.rawKey AS rawKey,
 72                   rel.accessPattern AS accessPattern,
 73                   rel.optionsType AS optionsType,
 74                   rel.confidence AS confidence
 75            ORDER BY coalesce(rel.confidence, 0) DESC, consumer.filePath, consumer.lineNumber, consumer.name
 76            LIMIT 100
 77            """;
 78
 079        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new
 080        {
 081            canonicalKeyNormalized = Normalize(canonicalKey),
 082            projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext)
 083        });
 84
 085        var results = new List<ConfigurationUsage>();
 086        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 87        {
 088            results.Add(new ConfigurationUsage
 089            {
 090                ConsumerNode = MapToCodeNode(record["consumer"].As<INode>()),
 091                KeyNode = MapToCodeNode(record["key"].As<INode>()),
 092                RelationshipType = record["relationshipType"].As<string>(),
 093                RawKey = record["rawKey"].As<string?>(),
 094                AccessPattern = record["accessPattern"].As<string?>(),
 095                OptionsType = record["optionsType"].As<string?>(),
 096                Confidence = record["confidence"].As<double?>()
 097            });
 98        }
 99
 0100        return results;
 0101    }
 102}

/home/runner/work/code-meridian/code-meridian/src/Infrastructure/Graph/Neo4jCodeGraphRepository.cs

#LineLine coverage
 1using System.Text;
 2using CodeMeridian.Core.CodeGraph;
 3using CodeMeridian.Infrastructure.Configuration;
 4using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
 5using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;
 6using Neo4j.Driver;
 7
 8namespace CodeMeridian.Infrastructure.Graph;
 9
 10/// <summary>
 11/// Stores and queries the code knowledge graph in Neo4j.
 12/// Nodes represent code elements (classes, methods, etc.).
 13/// Edges represent structural relationships (calls, inherits, etc.).
 14/// Structural analytics are in Neo4jCodeGraphRepository.Analytics.cs.
 15/// GDS (Graph Data Science) queries are in Neo4jCodeGraphRepository.Gds.cs.
 16/// </summary>
 17public sealed partial class Neo4jCodeGraphRepository : ICodeGraphRepository, IAsyncDisposable
 18{
 19    private readonly IDriver _driver;
 20    private readonly ILogger<Neo4jCodeGraphRepository> _logger;
 21    private readonly int _embeddingDimensions;
 22
 023    public Neo4jCodeGraphRepository(
 024        IOptions<Neo4jOptions> options,
 025        ILogger<Neo4jCodeGraphRepository> logger)
 26    {
 027        _logger = logger;
 028        var opts = options.Value;
 029        _embeddingDimensions = opts.EmbeddingDimensions;
 030        _driver = GraphDatabase.Driver(
 031            opts.Uri,
 032            AuthTokens.Basic(opts.Username, opts.Password),
 033            config => config
 034                .WithMaxConnectionPoolSize(opts.MaxConnectionPoolSize)
 035                .WithConnectionTimeout(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(opts.ConnectionTimeoutSeconds)));
 036    }
 37
 38    /// <summary>Creates indexes and constraints on first run.</summary>
 39    public async Task InitializeAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 40    {
 041        _logger.LogInformation("Initializing Neo4j code graph schema...");
 42
 043        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 44
 045        await session.ExecuteWriteAsync(async tx =>
 046        {
 047            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 048                "CREATE CONSTRAINT codenode_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) REQUIRE n.id IS UNIQUE")).ConsumeAsync();
 049            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 050                "CREATE INDEX codenode_name IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) ON (n.name)")).ConsumeAsync();
 051            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 052                "CREATE INDEX codenode_name_normalized IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) ON (n.nameNormalized)")).ConsumeAs
 053            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 054                "CREATE TEXT INDEX codenode_name_normalized_text IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) ON (n.nameNormalized)"))
 055            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 056                "CREATE INDEX codenode_project IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) ON (n.projectContext)")).ConsumeAsync();
 057            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 058                "CREATE INDEX codenode_project_normalized IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) ON (n.projectContextNormalized)
 059            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 060                "CREATE INDEX codenode_namespace_normalized IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) ON (n.namespaceNormalized)"))
 061            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 062                "CREATE TEXT INDEX codenode_namespace_normalized_text IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) ON (n.namespaceNorm
 063            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 064                "CREATE INDEX codenode_filepath_normalized IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) ON (n.filePathNormalized)")).C
 065            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 066                "CREATE INDEX codenode_filerole IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) ON (n.fileRole)")).ConsumeAsync();
 067            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 068                "CREATE TEXT INDEX codenode_filepath_normalized_text IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) ON (n.filePathNormal
 069            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 070                "CREATE FULLTEXT INDEX codenode_fulltext IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) ON EACH [n.name, n.summary]")).C
 071            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 072                "CREATE INDEX codenode_createdat IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) ON (n.createdAt)")).ConsumeAsync();
 073            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 074                "CREATE INDEX codenode_updatedat IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) ON (n.updatedAt)")).ConsumeAsync();
 075            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 076                "CREATE INDEX codenode_lastindexedat IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) ON (n.lastIndexedAt)")).ConsumeAsync
 077            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 078                "CREATE INDEX codenode_sourcehash IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) ON (n.sourceHash)")).ConsumeAsync();
 079            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 080                "CREATE INDEX codenode_linecount IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) ON (n.lineCount)")).ConsumeAsync();
 081            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 082                "CREATE INDEX codenode_changecount IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:CodeNode) ON (n.changeCount)")).ConsumeAsync();
 083        });
 84
 085        await session.ExecuteWriteAsync(async tx =>
 086        {
 087            await (await tx.RunAsync(
 088                """
 089                MATCH (n:CodeNode)
 090                WHERE n.nameNormalized IS NULL
 091                   OR (n.namespace IS NOT NULL AND n.namespaceNormalized IS NULL)
 092                   OR (n.filePath IS NOT NULL AND n.filePathNormalized IS NULL)
 093                   OR (n.projectContext IS NOT NULL AND n.projectContextNormalized IS NULL)
 094                SET n.nameNormalized = toLower(n.name),
 095                    n.namespaceNormalized = CASE WHEN n.namespace IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE toLower(n.namespace) END,
 096                    n.filePathNormalized = CASE WHEN n.filePath IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE toLower(n.filePath) END,
 097                    n.projectContextNormalized = CASE WHEN n.projectContext IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE toLower(n.projectCont
 098                """
 099            )).ConsumeAsync();
 0100        });
 101
 102        // Vector index must be created outside an explicit transaction in Neo4j 5.x
 0103        await using var vectorSession = _driver.AsyncSession();
 104        try
 105        {
 0106            await (await vectorSession.RunAsync(
 0107                "CREATE VECTOR INDEX codenode_embeddings IF NOT EXISTS " +
 0108                "FOR (n:CodeNode) ON (n.embedding) " +
 0109                $"OPTIONS {{indexConfig: {{`vector.dimensions`: {_embeddingDimensions}, `vector.similarity_function`: 'c
 0110        }
 0111        catch (Exception ex)
 112        {
 113            // Vector index may already exist or Neo4j edition may not support it — non-fatal
 0114            _logger.LogWarning(ex, "Could not create vector index — native embedding search will be unavailable.");
 0115        }
 116
 0117        _logger.LogInformation("Neo4j code graph schema ready.");
 0118    }
 119
 120    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<CodeNode>> QueryNodesAsync(
 121        CodeGraphQuery query,
 122        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 123    {
 0124        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 125
 126        // Prefer full-text search when a semantic query is provided
 0127        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(query.SemanticQuery))
 128        {
 0129            return await FullTextSearchAsync(session, query, cancellationToken);
 130        }
 131
 0132        return await FilteredQueryAsync(session, query, cancellationToken);
 0133    }
 134
 135    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<CodeEdge>> QueryEdgesAsync(
 136        string nodeId,
 137        int depth = 1,
 138        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 139    {
 0140        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 141
 0142        var cypher = $$"""
 0143            MATCH (source:CodeNode {id: $nodeId})-[r*1..{{depth}}]-(target:CodeNode)
 0144            UNWIND r AS rel
 0145            RETURN DISTINCT rel
 0146            LIMIT 100
 0147            """;
 148
 0149        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new { nodeId });
 0150        var edges = new List<CodeEdge>();
 151
 0152        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 153        {
 0154            var rel = record["rel"].As<IRelationship>();
 0155            edges.Add(MapToCodeEdge(rel));
 156        }
 157
 0158        return edges;
 0159    }
 160
 161    public async Task<long> CountCodeNodesAsync(string? projectContext = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = def
 162    {
 0163        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 164
 165        const string cypher = """
 166            MATCH (n:CodeNode)
 167            WHERE ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 168            RETURN count(n) AS count
 169            """;
 170
 0171        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new { projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext) 
 0172        var record = await cursor.SingleAsync();
 0173        return record["count"].As<long>();
 0174    }
 175
 176    public async Task<long> CountCallEdgesAsync(string? projectContext = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = def
 177    {
 0178        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 179
 180        const string cypher = """
 181            MATCH (s:CodeNode)-[r:Calls]->(t:CodeNode)
 182            WHERE ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR s.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized OR t.proj
 183            RETURN count(r) AS count
 184            """;
 185
 0186        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new { projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext) 
 0187        var record = await cursor.SingleAsync();
 0188        return record["count"].As<long>();
 0189    }
 190
 191    public async Task<long> CountDiagnosticsAsync(string? projectContext = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = d
 192    {
