 0193        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 194
 195        const string cypher = """
 196            MATCH (n:CodeNode)
 197            WHERE n.type = 'Diagnostic'
 198              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 199            RETURN count(n) AS count
 200            """;
 201
 0202        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new { projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext) 
 0203        var record = await cursor.SingleAsync();
 0204        return record["count"].As<long>();
 0205    }
 206
 207    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<string>> GetProjectContextsAsync(string? search = null, CancellationToken cancellati
 208    {
 0209        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 0210        var normalizedSearch = NormalizeForProjectContextSuggestion(search);
 0211        var first = normalizedSearch is { Length: > 0 } ? normalizedSearch[..1] : null;
 0212        var last = normalizedSearch is { Length: > 0 } ? normalizedSearch[^1..] : null;
 213
 214        const string cypher = """
 215            MATCH (n:CodeNode)
 216            WHERE n.projectContext IS NOT NULL
 217              AND n.projectContextNormalized IS NOT NULL
 218              AND trim(n.projectContext) <> ''
 219              AND ($first IS NULL OR n.projectContextNormalized STARTS WITH $first)
 220              AND ($last IS NULL OR n.projectContextNormalized ENDS WITH $last)
 221            RETURN DISTINCT n.projectContext AS projectContext
 222            ORDER BY projectContext
 223            LIMIT 100
 224            """;
 225
 0226        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new { first, last });
 0227        var results = new List<string>();
 228
 0229        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 0230            results.Add(record["projectContext"].As<string>());
 231
 0232        return results;
 0233    }
 234
 235    private static string? NormalizeForProjectContextSuggestion(string? value)
 236    {
 0237        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
 0238            return null;
 239
 0240        var builder = new StringBuilder(value.Length);
 0241        foreach (var ch in value)
 242        {
 0243            if (char.IsLetterOrDigit(ch))
 0244                builder.Append(char.ToLowerInvariant(ch));
 245        }
 246
 0247        return builder.Length == 0 ? null : builder.ToString();
 248    }
 249
 250    public async Task<string> GetSubgraphSummaryAsync(
 251        string nodeId,
 252        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 253    {
 0254        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 255
 256        const string cypher = """
 257            MATCH (n:CodeNode {id: $nodeId})
 258            OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[r]->(related:CodeNode)
 259            RETURN n, collect({relType: type(r), name: related.name, type: related.type}) AS relations
 260            """;
 261
 0262        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new { nodeId });
 0263        var records = await cursor.ToListAsync();
 264
 0265        if (records.Count == 0) return string.Empty;
 266
 0267        var record = records[0];
 0268        var node = MapToCodeNode(record["n"].As<INode>());
 0269        var relations = record["relations"].As<List<IDictionary<string, object>>>();
 270
 0271        var sb = new StringBuilder();
 0272        sb.AppendLine($"**{node.Type}: {node.Name}**");
 273
 0274        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(node.Summary))
 0275            sb.AppendLine(node.Summary);
 276
 0277        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(node.FilePath))
 0278            sb.AppendLine($"File: `{node.FilePath}`");
 279
 0280        if (relations.Count > 0)
 281        {
 0282            sb.AppendLine("Relations:");
 283            foreach (var rel in relations.Take(10).Where(r => r["name"] is not null))
 0284                sb.AppendLine($"  - {rel["relType"]} → {rel["type"]}:{rel["name"]}");
 285        }
 286
 0287        return sb.ToString();
 0288    }
 289
 290    public async Task UpsertNodeAsync(CodeNode node, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 291    {
 0292        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 293
 294        const string cypher = """
 295            MERGE (n:CodeNode {id: $id})
 296            ON CREATE SET n.createdAt = $now,
 297                          n.updatedAt = $now,
 298                          n.changeCount = 0
 299            WITH n,
 300                 CASE
 301                   WHEN $sourceHash IS NULL THEN true
 302                   WHEN n.sourceHash IS NULL THEN true
 303                   WHEN n.sourceHash <> $sourceHash THEN true
 304                   ELSE false
 305                 END AS contentChanged
 306            SET n.name           = $name,
 307                n.nameNormalized = $nameNormalized,
 308                n.type           = $type,
 309                n.namespace      = $namespace,
 310                n.namespaceNormalized = $namespaceNormalized,
 311                n.filePath       = $filePath,
 312                n.filePathNormalized = $filePathNormalized,
 313                n.lineNumber     = $lineNumber,
 314                n.lineCount      = $lineCount,
 315                n.summary        = $summary,
 316                n.sourceSnippet  = $sourceSnippet,
 317                n.sourceHash     = $sourceHash,
 318                n.fileRole       = $fileRole,
 319                n.projectContext = $projectContext,
 320                n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized,
 321                n.lastIndexedAt  = $now,
 322                n.changeCount    = CASE WHEN contentChanged THEN coalesce(n.changeCount, 0) + 1 ELSE coalesce(n.changeCo
 323                n.updatedAt      = CASE WHEN contentChanged THEN $now ELSE n.updatedAt END
 324            SET n += $properties
 325            """;
 326
 0327        var now = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow.ToUnixTimeMilliseconds();
 328
 0329        await session.ExecuteWriteAsync(async tx =>
 0330        {
 0331            var cursor = await tx.RunAsync(cypher, new
 0332            {
 0333                id = node.Id,
 0334                name = node.Name,
 0335                nameNormalized = Normalize(node.Name),
 0336                type = node.Type.ToString(),
 0337                @namespace = node.Namespace,
 0338                namespaceNormalized = Normalize(node.Namespace),
 0339                filePath = node.FilePath,
 0340                filePathNormalized = Normalize(node.FilePath),
 0341                lineNumber = (object?)node.LineNumber,
 0342                lineCount = (object?)node.LineCount,
 0343                summary = node.Summary,
 0344                sourceSnippet = node.SourceSnippet,
 0345                sourceHash = node.SourceHash,
 0346                fileRole = node.FileRole.ToString(),
 0347                projectContext = node.ProjectContext,
 0348                projectContextNormalized = Normalize(node.ProjectContext),
 0349                properties = node.Properties,
 0350                now
 0351            });
 0352            await cursor.ConsumeAsync();
 0353        });
 354
 355        // Store embedding separately to avoid overwriting existing embeddings with null
 0356        if (node.Embedding is { Length: > 0 } embedding)
 357        {
 358            const string embCypher = "MATCH (n:CodeNode {id: $id}) SET n.embedding = $embedding";
 0359            await session.ExecuteWriteAsync(async tx =>
 0360            {
 0361                var cursor = await tx.RunAsync(embCypher, new { id = node.Id, embedding });
 0362                await cursor.ConsumeAsync();
 0363            });
 364        }
 0365    }
 366
 367    public async Task UpsertEdgeAsync(CodeEdge edge, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 368    {
 0369        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 370
 371        // Edge type is an enum value — safe to interpolate (no user input)
 0372        var cypher = BuildUpsertEdgeCypher(edge);
 0373        var mergeCallSite = IsConfigurationUsageEdge(edge) ? edge.CallSite ?? string.Empty : null;
 0374        var mergeAccessPattern = IsConfigurationUsageEdge(edge) ? GetEdgeProperty(edge, "accessPattern") ?? string.Empty
 0375        var mergeRawKey = IsConfigurationUsageEdge(edge) ? GetEdgeProperty(edge, "rawKey") ?? string.Empty : null;
 376
 0377        var edgeCount = await session.ExecuteWriteAsync(async tx =>
 0378        {
 0379            var cursor = await tx.RunAsync(cypher, new
 0380            {
 0381                sourceId   = edge.SourceId,
 0382                targetId   = edge.TargetId,
 0383                isAsync    = (object?)edge.IsAsync,
 0384                callSite   = (object?)edge.CallSite,
 0385                paramCount = (object?)edge.ParamCount,
 0386                confidence = (object?)edge.Confidence,
 0387                properties = edge.Properties,
 0388                mergeCallSite = (object?)mergeCallSite,
 0389                mergeAccessPattern = (object?)mergeAccessPattern,
 0390                mergeRawKey = (object?)mergeRawKey
 0391            });
 0392            var record = await cursor.SingleAsync();
 0393            await cursor.ConsumeAsync();
 0394            return record["edgeCount"].As<long>();
 0395        });
 396
 0397        if (edgeCount == 0)
 398        {
 0399            _logger.LogWarning(
 0400                "Skipped {EdgeType} edge because source or target node was missing. Source: {SourceId}; Target: {TargetI
 0401                edge.Type,
 0402                edge.SourceId,
 0403                edge.TargetId);
 404        }
 0405    }
 406
 407    public async Task DeleteProjectAsync(string projectContext, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 408    {
 0409        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 410
 411        const string cypher = """
 412            MATCH (n:CodeNode)
 413            WHERE n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized
 414            DETACH DELETE n
 415            """;
 416
 0417        await session.ExecuteWriteAsync(async tx =>
 0418        {
 0419            var cursor = await tx.RunAsync(cypher, new { projectContextNormalized = Normalize(projectContext) });
 0420            await cursor.ConsumeAsync();
 0421        });
 0422    }
 423
 424    public async Task DeleteFileAsync(
 425        string projectContext,
 426        string filePath,
 427        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 428    {
 0429        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 430
 431        const string cypher = """
 432            MATCH (n:CodeNode)
 433            WHERE n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized
 434              AND n.filePathNormalized = $filePathNormalized
 435            DETACH DELETE n
 436            """;
 437
 0438        await session.ExecuteWriteAsync(async tx =>
 0439        {
 0440            var cursor = await tx.RunAsync(cypher, new
 0441            {
 0442                projectContextNormalized = Normalize(projectContext),
 0443                filePathNormalized = Normalize(filePath)
 0444            });
 0445            await cursor.ConsumeAsync();
 0446        });
 0447    }
 448
 449    public async Task DeleteDiagnosticsAsync(string projectContext, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 450    {
 0451        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 452
 453        const string cypher = """
 454            MATCH (n:CodeNode)
 455            WHERE n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized
 456              AND n.type = 'Diagnostic'
 457            DETACH DELETE n
 458            """;
 459
 0460        await session.ExecuteWriteAsync(async tx =>
 0461        {
 0462            var cursor = await tx.RunAsync(cypher, new { projectContextNormalized = Normalize(projectContext) });
 0463            await cursor.ConsumeAsync();
 0464        });
 0465    }
 466
 467    public async Task DeleteConfigurationAsync(string projectContext, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 468    {
 0469        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 470
 471        const string cypher = """
 472            MATCH (n:CodeNode)
 473            WHERE n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized
 474              AND n.type IN ['ConfigurationFile', 'ConfigurationEntry']
 475            DETACH DELETE n
 476
 477            WITH $projectContextNormalized AS projectContextNormalized
 478            MATCH (key:CodeNode)
 479            WHERE key.projectContextNormalized = projectContextNormalized
 480              AND key.type = 'ConfigurationKey'
 481              AND NOT (key)<-[:DefinesConfig|OverridesConfig]-(:CodeNode)
 482              AND NOT (:CodeNode)-[:ReadsConfig|BindsConfig]->(key)
 483            DETACH DELETE key
 484            """;
 485
 0486        await session.ExecuteWriteAsync(async tx =>
 0487        {
 0488            var cursor = await tx.RunAsync(cypher, new { projectContextNormalized = Normalize(projectContext) });
 0489            await cursor.ConsumeAsync();
 0490        });
 0491    }
 492
 493    public async Task DeleteAllAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 494    {
 0495        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 496
 497        const string cypher = """
 498            MATCH (n:CodeNode)
 499            DETACH DELETE n
 500            """;
 501
 0502        await session.ExecuteWriteAsync(async tx =>
 0503        {
 0504            var cursor = await tx.RunAsync(cypher);
 0505            await cursor.ConsumeAsync();
 0506        });
 0507    }
 508
 509    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<CodeNode>> FindDiagnosticsAsync(
 510        string? projectContext = null,
 511        string? severity = null,
 512        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 513    {
 0514        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 515
 516        const string cypher = """
 517            MATCH (n:CodeNode)
 518            WHERE n.type = 'Diagnostic'
 519              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 520              AND ($severityNormalized IS NULL OR n.nameNormalized STARTS WITH $severityNormalized)
 521            RETURN n
 522            ORDER BY n.filePath, n.lineNumber, n.name
 523            LIMIT 200
 524            """;
 525
 0526        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new
 0527        {
 0528            projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext),
 0529            severityNormalized = (object?)Normalize(severity)
 0530        });
 531
 0532        var nodes = new List<CodeNode>();
 0533        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 0534            nodes.Add(MapToCodeNode(record["n"].As<INode>()));
 535
 0536        return nodes;
 0537    }
 538
 539    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<CodeNode>> FindDiagnosticsForNodeAsync(
 540        string nodeId,
 541        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 542    {
 0543        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 544
 545        const string cypher = """
 546            MATCH (target:CodeNode {id: $nodeId})
 547            MATCH (diag:CodeNode)
 548            WHERE diag.type = 'Diagnostic'
 549              AND diag.projectContextNormalized = target.projectContextNormalized
 550              AND diag.filePathNormalized = target.filePathNormalized
 551            RETURN diag AS n
 552            ORDER BY abs(coalesce(diag.lineNumber, 0) - coalesce(target.lineNumber, 0)), diag.lineNumber
 553            LIMIT 50
 554            """;
 555
 0556        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new { nodeId });
 0557        var nodes = new List<CodeNode>();
 0558        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 0559            nodes.Add(MapToCodeNode(record["n"].As<INode>()));
 560
 0561        return nodes;
 0562    }
 563
 564    public async Task<DateTimeOffset?> GetMostRecentCodeUpdateAsync(
 565        string? projectContext = null,
 566        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 567    {
 0568        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 569
 570        const string cypher = """
 571            MATCH (n:CodeNode)
 572            WHERE ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 573              AND n.updatedAt IS NOT NULL
 574            RETURN max(n.updatedAt) AS updatedAt
 575            """;
 576
 0577        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new { projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext) 
 0578        var records = await cursor.ToListAsync();
 579
 0580        if (records.Count == 0)
 0581            return null;
 582
 0583        var raw = records[0]["updatedAt"];
 0584        if (raw is null || raw == DBNull.Value)
 0585            return null;
 586
 0587        return DateTimeOffset.FromUnixTimeMilliseconds(raw.As<long>());
 0588    }
 589
 590    // ── Private helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 591
 592    private static async Task<IReadOnlyList<CodeNode>> FullTextSearchAsync(
 593        IAsyncSession session,
 594        CodeGraphQuery query,
 595        CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 596    {
 0597        var luceneQuery = EscapeLuceneQuery(query.SemanticQuery);
 598
 599        // Full-text query; project filter applied post-retrieval if needed
 600        const string cypher = """
 601            CALL db.index.fulltext.queryNodes('codenode_fulltext', $query)
 602            YIELD node, score
 603            WHERE ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR node.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 604            RETURN node
 605            ORDER BY score DESC
 606            LIMIT $limit
 607            """;
 608
 0609        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new
 0610        {
 0611            query = luceneQuery,
 0612            projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(query.ProjectContext),
 0613            limit = query.Limit
 0614        });
 615
 0616        var nodes = new List<CodeNode>();
 0617        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 0618            nodes.Add(MapToCodeNode(record["node"].As<INode>()));
 619
 0620        return nodes;
 0621    }
 622
 623    private static string EscapeLuceneQuery(string? query)
 624    {
 0625        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(query))
 0626            return string.Empty;
 627
 0628        var sb = new StringBuilder(query.Length * 2);
 0629        foreach (var ch in query.Trim())
 630        {
 0631            if ("+-!(){}[]^\"~*?:\\/".Contains(ch))
 0632                sb.Append('\\');
 633
 0634            sb.Append(ch);
 635        }
 636
 0637        return sb.ToString();
 638    }
 639
 640    private static async Task<IReadOnlyList<CodeNode>> FilteredQueryAsync(
 641        IAsyncSession session,
 642        CodeGraphQuery query,
 643        CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 644    {
 0645        var conditions = new List<string>();
 0646        if (query.ProjectContext is not null) conditions.Add("n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized");
 0647        if (query.NameFilter is not null) conditions.Add("n.nameNormalized CONTAINS $nameFilterNormalized");
 0648        if (query.FilePathFilter is not null) conditions.Add("n.filePathNormalized CONTAINS $filePathFilterNormalized");
 0649        if (query.TypeFilter.HasValue) conditions.Add("n.type = $typeFilter");
 650
 0651        var where = conditions.Count > 0 ? $"WHERE {string.Join(" AND ", conditions)}" : string.Empty;
 0652        var cypher = $"MATCH (n:CodeNode) {where} RETURN n LIMIT $limit";
 653
 0654        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new
 0655        {
 0656            projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(query.ProjectContext),
 0657            nameFilterNormalized = (object?)Normalize(query.NameFilter),
 0658            filePathFilterNormalized = (object?)Normalize(query.FilePathFilter),
 0659            typeFilter = (object?)query.TypeFilter?.ToString(),
 0660            limit = query.Limit
 0661        });
 662
 0663        var nodes = new List<CodeNode>();
 0664        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 0665            nodes.Add(MapToCodeNode(record["n"].As<INode>()));
 666
 0667        return nodes;
 0668    }
 669
 670    private static CodeNode MapToCodeNode(INode node)
 671    {
 0672        var props = node.Properties;
 673
 674        DateTimeOffset? ReadTimestamp(string key)
 675        {
 0676            if (!props.TryGetValue(key, out var raw) || raw is null) return null;
 0677            var ms = raw.As<long?>();
 0678            return ms.HasValue ? DateTimeOffset.FromUnixTimeMilliseconds(ms.Value) : null;
 679        }
 680
 0681        return new CodeNode
 0682        {
 0683            Id = props["id"].As<string>(),
 0684            Name = props["name"].As<string>(),
 0685            Type = Enum.Parse<CodeNodeType>(props["type"].As<string>(), ignoreCase: true),
 0686            Namespace = props.TryGetValue("namespace", out var ns) ? ns?.As<string>() : null,
 0687            FilePath = props.TryGetValue("filePath", out var fp) ? fp?.As<string>() : null,
 0688            LineNumber = props.TryGetValue("lineNumber", out var ln) ? ln?.As<int?>() : null,
 0689            LineCount = props.TryGetValue("lineCount", out var lc) ? lc?.As<int?>() : null,
 0690            Summary = props.TryGetValue("summary", out var sum) ? sum?.As<string>() : null,
 0691            SourceSnippet = props.TryGetValue("sourceSnippet", out var ss) ? ss?.As<string>() : null,
 0692            ProjectContext = props.TryGetValue("projectContext", out var pc) ? pc?.As<string>() : null,
 0693            FileRole = props.TryGetValue("fileRole", out var fr) && Enum.TryParse<IndexedFileRole>(fr?.As<string>(), tru
 0694                ? fileRole
 0695                : IndexedFileRole.Unknown,
 0696            SourceHash = props.TryGetValue("sourceHash", out var sh) ? sh?.As<string>() : null,
 0697            Properties = ReadProperties(props, NodeReservedPropertyNames),
 0698            ChangeCount = props.TryGetValue("changeCount", out var cc) ? cc?.As<int?>() : null,
 0699            CreatedAt = ReadTimestamp("createdAt"),
 0700            UpdatedAt = ReadTimestamp("updatedAt"),
 0701            LastIndexedAt = ReadTimestamp("lastIndexedAt")
 0702        };
 703    }
 704
 705    private static string? Normalize(string? value) =>
 0706        string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? null : value.ToLowerInvariant();
 707
 708    private static string BuildUpsertEdgeCypher(CodeEdge edge)
 709    {
 0710        var relationshipPattern = IsConfigurationUsageEdge(edge)
 0711            ? $"[r:{edge.Type} {{callSite: $mergeCallSite, accessPattern: $mergeAccessPattern, rawKey: $mergeRawKey}}]"
 0712            : $"[r:{edge.Type}]";
 713
 0714        return $@"
 0715            MATCH (s:CodeNode {{id: $sourceId}})
 0716            MATCH (t:CodeNode {{id: $targetId}})
 0717            MERGE (s)-{relationshipPattern}->(t)
 0718            SET r.isAsync     = $isAsync,
 0719                r.callSite    = $callSite,
 0720                r.paramCount  = $paramCount,
 0721                r.confidence  = $confidence
 0722            SET r += $properties
 0723            RETURN count(r) AS edgeCount
 0724            ";
 725    }
 726
 727    private static bool IsConfigurationUsageEdge(CodeEdge edge) =>
 0728        edge.Type is CodeEdgeType.ReadsConfig or CodeEdgeType.BindsConfig;
 729
 730    private static string? GetEdgeProperty(CodeEdge edge, string key) =>
 0731        edge.Properties is not null && edge.Properties.TryGetValue(key, out var value) ? value : null;
 732
 733    private static CodeEdge MapToCodeEdge(IRelationship rel)
 734    {
 0735        var props = rel.Properties;
 0736        return new CodeEdge
 0737        {
 0738            SourceId   = rel.StartNodeElementId,
 0739            TargetId   = rel.EndNodeElementId,
 0740            Type       = Enum.Parse<CodeEdgeType>(rel.Type, ignoreCase: true),
 0741            IsAsync    = props.TryGetValue("isAsync",    out var ia)  ? ia?.As<bool?>()   : null,
 0742            CallSite   = props.TryGetValue("callSite",   out var cs)  ? cs?.As<string>()  : null,
 0743            ParamCount = props.TryGetValue("paramCount", out var pc)  ? pc?.As<int?>()    : null,
 0744            Confidence = props.TryGetValue("confidence", out var con) ? con?.As<double?>(): null,
 0745            Properties = ReadProperties(props, EdgeReservedPropertyNames)
 0746        };
 747    }
 748
 0749    private static readonly HashSet<string> NodeReservedPropertyNames =
 0750    [
 0751        "id", "name", "nameNormalized", "type", "namespace", "namespaceNormalized", "filePath", "filePathNormalized",
 0752        "lineNumber", "lineCount", "summary", "sourceSnippet", "sourceHash", "fileRole", "projectContext",
 0753        "projectContextNormalized", "createdAt", "updatedAt", "lastIndexedAt", "changeCount", "embedding"
 0754    ];
 755
 0756    private static readonly HashSet<string> EdgeReservedPropertyNames =
 0757    [
 0758        "isAsync", "callSite", "paramCount", "confidence"
 0759    ];
 760
 761    private static Dictionary<string, string> ReadProperties(
 762        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object> properties,
 763        HashSet<string> reservedNames)
 764    {
 0765        var result = new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.Ordinal);
 0766        foreach (var pair in properties)
 767        {
 0768            if (reservedNames.Contains(pair.Key) || pair.Value is null)
 769                continue;
 770
 0771            result[pair.Key] = pair.Value switch
 0772            {
 0773                string value => value,
 0774                bool value => value ? "true" : "false",
 0775                _ => pair.Value.ToString() ?? string.Empty
 0776            };
 777        }
 778
 0779        return result;
 780    }
 781
 0782    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync() => await _driver.DisposeAsync();
 783}

/home/runner/work/code-meridian/code-meridian/src/Infrastructure/Graph/Neo4jCodeGraphRepository.EndpointTracing.cs

#LineLine coverage
 1using CodeMeridian.Core.CodeGraph;
 2using Neo4j.Driver;
 3
 4namespace CodeMeridian.Infrastructure.Graph;
 5
 6public sealed partial class Neo4jCodeGraphRepository
 7{
 8    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<EndpointTracePath>> FindEndpointTracesAsync(
 9        string endpointRoute,
 10        string? projectContext = null,
 11        int maxDepth = 10,
 12        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 13    {
 014        var clampedDepth = Math.Clamp(maxDepth, 1, 12);
 015        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 16
 017        var cypher = $$"""
 018            MATCH (endpoint:CodeNode)
 019            WHERE endpoint.type = 'ApiEndpoint'
 020              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR endpoint.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 021              AND (
 022                    endpoint.name = $endpointRoute
 023                 OR toLower(endpoint.name) = toLower($endpointRoute)
 024                 OR endpoint.id = $endpointRoute
 025                 OR endpoint.id ENDS WITH $endpointSuffix
 026              )
 027            MATCH (target:CodeNode)
 028            WHERE ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR target.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 029              AND (
 030                    target.type IN ['DatabaseTable', 'MessageTopic']
 031                 OR (target.type = 'ExternalConcept' AND target.externalKind = 'DatabaseTable')
 032              )
 033            MATCH path = shortestPath((endpoint)-[:{{ConnectionRelationships}}*1..{{clampedDepth}}]-(target))
 034            RETURN [n IN nodes(path) | n] AS pathNodes,
 035                   [r IN relationships(path) | { type: type(r), confidence: r.confidence }] AS pathRelationships
 036            ORDER BY length(path) ASC, target.name
 037            LIMIT 20
 038            """;
 39
 040        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new
 041        {
 042            endpointRoute,
 043            endpointSuffix = $"::ApiEndpoint::{endpointRoute}",
 044            projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext)
 045        });
 46
 047        var results = new List<EndpointTracePath>();
 048        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 49        {
 050            var pathNodes = record["pathNodes"].As<List<INode>>();
 051            var pathRelationships = record["pathRelationships"].As<List<object>>();
 052            var steps = new List<GraphPathStep>(pathNodes.Count);
 53
 054            for (var i = 0; i < pathNodes.Count; i++)
 55            {
 056                string? relationshipType = null;
 057                double? relationshipConfidence = null;
 58
 059                if (i < pathRelationships.Count && pathRelationships[i] is IDictionary<string, object> rel)
 60                {
 061                    relationshipType = rel.TryGetValue("type", out var typeValue)
 062                        ? typeValue?.ToString()
 063                        : null;
 64
 065                    if (rel.TryGetValue("confidence", out var confidenceValue) && confidenceValue is not null)
 66                    {
 067                        relationshipConfidence = confidenceValue switch
 068                        {
 069                            double value => value,
 070                            float value => value,
 071                            long value => value,
 072                            int value => value,
 073                            _ when double.TryParse(confidenceValue.ToString(), out var parsed) => parsed,
 074                            _ => null
 075                        };
 76                    }
 77                }
 78
 079                steps.Add(new GraphPathStep(
 080                    MapToCodeNode(pathNodes[i]),
 081                    relationshipType,
 082                    relationshipConfidence));
 83            }
 84
 085            results.Add(new EndpointTracePath(steps));
 86        }
 87
 088        return results;
 089    }
 90}

/home/runner/work/code-meridian/code-meridian/src/Infrastructure/Graph/Neo4jCodeGraphRepository.FileRoles.cs

#LineLine coverage
 1namespace CodeMeridian.Infrastructure.Graph;
 2
 3public sealed partial class Neo4jCodeGraphRepository
 4{
 5    private static string FileRoleExpression(string alias) =>
 06        $"coalesce({alias}.fileRole, 'Unknown')";
 7}

/home/runner/work/code-meridian/code-meridian/src/Infrastructure/Graph/Neo4jCodeGraphRepository.Gds.cs

#LineLine coverage
 1using CodeMeridian.Core.CodeGraph;
 2using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
 3using Neo4j.Driver;
 4
 5namespace CodeMeridian.Infrastructure.Graph;
 6
 7/// <summary>
 8/// Graph Data Science (GDS) plugin queries — PageRank, Betweenness, Louvain, vector similarity.
 9/// All GDS methods share a common project/stream/drop lifecycle via RunGdsStreamAsync.
 10/// Analytics queries live in Neo4jCodeGraphRepository.Analytics.cs.
 11/// </summary>
 12public sealed partial class Neo4jCodeGraphRepository
 13{
 014    private static readonly string[] RiskCoreRelationshipTypes =
 015    [
 016        "Calls",
 017        "Uses",
 018        "DependsOn",
 019        "Implements",
 020        "Inherits",
 021        "Reads",
 022        "Writes",
 023        "PublishesTo",
 024        "SubscribesTo",
 025        "UsesClass",
 026        "UsesId",
 027        "DefinesSelector",
 028        "ImportsStyle",
 029        "UsesCssVariable",
 030        "DefinesCssVariable"
 031    ];
 32
 33    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Node, double Score)>> GetPageRankAsync(
 34        string? projectContext = null,
 35        int limit = 20,
 36        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 37    {
 038        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 039        var graphName = $"cm_pr_{Guid.NewGuid():N}";
 040        var relationshipProjection = await BuildRelationshipProjectionAsync(session, RiskCoreRelationshipTypes, undirect
 041        if (relationshipProjection is null)
 042            return [];
 43
 044        var projectCypher = $"""
 045            CALL gds.graph.project($graphName, 'CodeNode', {relationshipProjection})
 046            YIELD graphName, nodeCount, relationshipCount
 047            """;
 48
 49        const string streamCypher = """
 50            CALL gds.pageRank.stream($graphName)
 51            YIELD nodeId, score
 52            MATCH (n:CodeNode) WHERE id(n) = nodeId
 53              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 54            RETURN n, score
 55            ORDER BY score DESC
 56            LIMIT $limit
 57            """;
 58
 059        return await RunGdsStreamAsync(session, graphName, projectCypher, streamCypher,
 060            new { graphName, projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext), limit },
 61            r => (MapToCodeNode(r["n"].As<INode>()), r["score"].As<double>()),
 062            cancellationToken);
 063    }
 64
 65    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Node, double Score)>> GetBetweennessAsync(
 66        string? projectContext = null,
 67        int limit = 20,
 68        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 69    {
 070        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 071        var graphName = $"cm_bc_{Guid.NewGuid():N}";
 072        var relationshipProjection = await BuildRelationshipProjectionAsync(session, RiskCoreRelationshipTypes, undirect
 073        if (relationshipProjection is null)
 074            return [];
 75
 076        var projectCypher = $"""
 077            CALL gds.graph.project($graphName, 'CodeNode', {relationshipProjection})
 078            YIELD graphName, nodeCount, relationshipCount
 079            """;
 80
 81        const string streamCypher = """
 82            CALL gds.betweenness.stream($graphName)
 83            YIELD nodeId, score
 84            MATCH (n:CodeNode) WHERE id(n) = nodeId
 85              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 86            RETURN n, score
 87            ORDER BY score DESC
 88            LIMIT $limit
 89            """;
 90
 091        return await RunGdsStreamAsync(session, graphName, projectCypher, streamCypher,
 092            new { graphName, projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext), limit },
 93            r => (MapToCodeNode(r["n"].As<INode>()), r["score"].As<double>()),
 094            cancellationToken);
 095    }
 96
 97    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Node, int ResultingComponentCount)>> GetArticulationPointsAsync(
 98        string? projectContext = null,
 99        int limit = 20,
 100        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 101    {
 0102        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 0103        var graphName = $"cm_ap_{Guid.NewGuid():N}";
 0104        var relationshipProjection = await BuildRelationshipProjectionAsync(session, RiskCoreRelationshipTypes, undirect
 0105        if (relationshipProjection is null)
 0106            return [];
 107
 0108        var projectCypher = $"""
 0109            CALL gds.graph.project($graphName, 'CodeNode', {relationshipProjection})
 0110            YIELD graphName, nodeCount, relationshipCount
 0111            """;
 112
 113        const string streamCypher = """
 114            CALL gds.articulationPoints.stream($graphName)
 115            YIELD nodeId, resultingComponents
 116            MATCH (n:CodeNode) WHERE id(n) = nodeId
 117              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 118            RETURN n, coalesce(resultingComponents['count'], 0) AS componentCount
 119            ORDER BY componentCount DESC, n.name
 120            LIMIT $limit
 121            """;
 122
 0123        return await RunGdsStreamAsync(session, graphName, projectCypher, streamCypher,
 0124            new { graphName, projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext), limit },
 125            r => (MapToCodeNode(r["n"].As<INode>()), r["componentCount"].As<int>()),
 0126            cancellationToken);
 0127    }
 128
 129    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Source, CodeNode Target, IReadOnlyList<long> RemainingSizes)>> GetBridgeEd
 130        string? projectContext = null,
 131        int limit = 20,
 132        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 133    {
 0134        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 0135        var graphName = $"cm_be_{Guid.NewGuid():N}";
 0136        var relationshipProjection = await BuildRelationshipProjectionAsync(session, RiskCoreRelationshipTypes, undirect
 0137        if (relationshipProjection is null)
 0138            return [];
 139
 0140        var projectCypher = $"""
 0141            CALL gds.graph.project($graphName, 'CodeNode', {relationshipProjection})
 0142            YIELD graphName, nodeCount, relationshipCount
 0143            """;
 144
 145        const string streamCypher = """
 146            CALL gds.bridges.stream($graphName)
 147            YIELD from, to, remainingSizes
 148            MATCH (source:CodeNode) WHERE id(source) = from
 149              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR source.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 150            MATCH (target:CodeNode) WHERE id(target) = to
 151              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR target.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 152            RETURN source, target, remainingSizes
 153            ORDER BY size(remainingSizes) DESC, source.name, target.name
 154            LIMIT $limit
 155            """;
 156
 0157        return await RunGdsStreamAsync(session, graphName, projectCypher, streamCypher,
 0158            new { graphName, projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext), limit },
 159            r => (
 160                MapToCodeNode(r["source"].As<INode>()),
 161                MapToCodeNode(r["target"].As<INode>()),
 162                (IReadOnlyList<long>)r["remainingSizes"].As<List<long>>()),
 0163            cancellationToken);
 0164    }
 165
 166    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Node, long Community)>> FindNaturalModulesAsync(
 167        string? projectContext = null,
 168        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 169    {
 0170        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 0171        var graphName = $"cm_lv_{Guid.NewGuid():N}";
 172
 173        // Louvain requires undirected relationships
 174        const string projectCypher = """
 175            CALL gds.graph.project($graphName, 'CodeNode', {
 176              Calls: {orientation: 'UNDIRECTED'}
 177            })
 178            YIELD graphName, nodeCount, relationshipCount
 179            """;
 180
 181        const string streamCypher = """
 182            CALL gds.louvain.stream($graphName)
 183            YIELD nodeId, communityId
 184            MATCH (n:CodeNode) WHERE id(n) = nodeId
 185              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 186            RETURN n, communityId
 187            ORDER BY communityId, n.name
 188            LIMIT 200
 189            """;
 190
 0191        return await RunGdsStreamAsync(session, graphName, projectCypher, streamCypher,
 0192            new { graphName, projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext) },
 193            r => (MapToCodeNode(r["n"].As<INode>()), r["communityId"].As<long>()),
 0194            cancellationToken);
 0195    }
 196
 197    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Node, long Community)>> FindNaturalModuleAssignmentsAsync(
 198        IReadOnlyCollection<string> nodeIds,
 199        string? projectContext = null,
 200        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 201    {
 0202        if (nodeIds.Count == 0)
 0203            return [];
 204
 0205        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 0206        var graphName = $"cm_lva_{Guid.NewGuid():N}";
 207
 208        const string projectCypher = """
 209            CALL gds.graph.project($graphName, 'CodeNode', {
 210              Calls: {orientation: 'UNDIRECTED'},
 211              Uses: {orientation: 'UNDIRECTED'},
 212              UsesClass: {orientation: 'UNDIRECTED'},
 213              DependsOn: {orientation: 'UNDIRECTED'},
 214              Contains: {orientation: 'UNDIRECTED'}
 215            })
 216            YIELD graphName, nodeCount, relationshipCount
 217            """;
 218
 219        const string streamCypher = """
 220            CALL gds.louvain.stream($graphName)
 221            YIELD nodeId, communityId
 222            MATCH (n:CodeNode) WHERE id(n) = nodeId
 223              AND n.id IN $nodeIds
 224              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR n.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 225            RETURN n, communityId
 226            ORDER BY communityId, n.name
 227            """;
 228
 0229        var requestedIds = nodeIds
 230            .Where(id => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(id))
 0231            .Distinct(StringComparer.Ordinal)
 0232            .ToArray();
 0233        if (requestedIds.Length == 0)
 0234            return [];
 235
 0236        return await RunGdsStreamAsync(session, graphName, projectCypher, streamCypher,
 0237            new { graphName, projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext), nodeIds = requestedIds },
 238            r => (MapToCodeNode(r["n"].As<INode>()), r["communityId"].As<long>()),
 0239            cancellationToken);
 0240    }
 241
 242    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Node, double Score)>> FindSimilarToNodeAsync(
 243        string nodeId,
 244        string? projectContext = null,
 245        int topK = 10,
 246        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 247    {
 0248        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 249
 250        // Fetch the source node's embedding, then query the vector index
 251        const string cypher = """
 252            MATCH (source:CodeNode {id: $nodeId})
 253            WHERE source.embedding IS NOT NULL
 254            CALL db.index.vector.queryNodes('codenode_embeddings', $topKPlus, source.embedding)
 255            YIELD node, score
 256            WHERE node.id <> $nodeId
 257              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR node.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 258            RETURN node, score
 259            LIMIT $topK
 260            """;
 261
 262        try
 263        {
 0264            var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new
 0265            {
 0266                nodeId,
 0267                projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext),
 0268                topK,
 0269                topKPlus = topK + 1
 0270            });
 271
 0272            var results = new List<(CodeNode, double)>();
 0273            await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 0274                results.Add((MapToCodeNode(record["node"].As<INode>()), record["score"].As<double>()));
 275
 0276            return results;
 277        }
 0278        catch (Exception ex) when (ex.Message.Contains("vector", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
 0279                                   || ex.Message.Contains("index", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
 280        {
 0281            _logger.LogWarning(ex, "Vector index not available. Ingest embeddings via ingest_code_node first.");
 0282            return [];
 283        }
 0284    }
 285
 286    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Node, double Score)>> FindHybridMatchesAsync(
 287        float[] queryEmbedding,
 288        string? nearNodeId = null,
 289        int maxHops = 3,
 290        string? projectContext = null,
 291        bool excludeTests = true,
 292        int topK = 10,
 293        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 294    {
 0295        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 296
 0297        var hops = Math.Clamp(maxHops, 1, 8);
 0298        IReadOnlyCollection<string>? allowedNodeIds = null;
 0299        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(nearNodeId))
 300        {
 0301            var neighborhoodCypher =
 0302                "MATCH (anchor:CodeNode {id: $nearNodeId})-[:Calls|Uses|DependsOn*1.." + hops + "]-(node:CodeNode) " +
 0303                "RETURN DISTINCT node.id AS id";
 304
 0305            var neighborhoodCursor = await session.RunAsync(neighborhoodCypher, new { nearNodeId });
 0306            var neighborhoodIds = new List<string>();
 0307            await foreach (var record in neighborhoodCursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 0308                neighborhoodIds.Add(record["id"].As<string>());
 0309            allowedNodeIds = neighborhoodIds;
 0310        }
 311
 0312        var roleFilter = excludeTests ? "AND coalesce(node.fileRole, 'Unknown') <> 'Test'" : string.Empty;
 313
 0314        var cypher = $"""
 0315            MATCH (node:CodeNode)
 0316            WHERE node.embedding IS NOT NULL
 0317              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR node.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 0318              {roleFilter}
 0319            WITH node, vector.similarity.cosine(node.embedding, $embedding) AS score
 0320            RETURN node, score
 0321            ORDER BY score DESC
 0322            LIMIT $topKPlus
 0323            """;
 324
 325        try
 326        {
 0327            var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new
 0328            {
 0329                embedding = queryEmbedding,
 0330                nearNodeId,
 0331                projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext),
 0332                topK,
 0333                topKPlus = topK + 1
 0334            });
 335
 0336            var results = new List<(CodeNode, double)>();
 0337            await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 0338                results.Add((MapToCodeNode(record["node"].As<INode>()), record["score"].As<double>()));
 339
 0340            if (allowedNodeIds is not null)
 341            {
 0342                var allowedLookup = allowedNodeIds.ToHashSet(StringComparer.Ordinal);
 0343                results = results.Where(item => allowedLookup.Contains(item.Item1.Id)).ToList();
 344            }
 345
 0346            return results;
 347        }
 0348        catch (Exception ex) when (ex.Message.Contains("vector", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
 0349                                   || ex.Message.Contains("index", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
 350        {
 0351            _logger.LogWarning(ex, "Vector index not available. Ingest embeddings via ingest_code_node first.");
 0352            return [];
 353        }
 0354    }

 356    // ── Private helper ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 357
 358    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<(CodeNode Node, double Score)>> FindImplementationPatternCandidatesAsync(
 359        float[] queryEmbedding,
 360        string? projectContext = null,
 361        bool excludeTests = true,
 362        int topK = 20,
 363        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 364    {
 0365        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 366
 0367        var roleFilter = excludeTests ? "AND coalesce(node.fileRole, 'Unknown') <> 'Test'" : string.Empty;
 0368        var cypher = $"""
 0369            MATCH (node:CodeNode)
 0370            WHERE node.embedding IS NOT NULL
 0371              AND node.type IN $nodeTypes
 0372              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR node.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 0373              AND coalesce(node.fileRole, 'Unknown') IN ['Source', 'Test', 'Unknown']
 0374              AND coalesce(node.fileRole, 'Unknown') <> 'Migration'
 0375              AND coalesce(node.fileRole, 'Unknown') <> 'Snapshot'
 0376              AND coalesce(node.fileRole, 'Unknown') <> 'Generated'
 0377              AND coalesce(node.fileRole, 'Unknown') <> 'BuildArtifact'
 0378              AND coalesce(node.fileRole, 'Unknown') <> 'Configuration'
 0379              {roleFilter}
 0380            WITH node, vector.similarity.cosine(node.embedding, $embedding) AS score
 0381            WHERE score >= $minScore
 0382            RETURN node, score
 0383            ORDER BY score DESC, coalesce(node.lineCount, 0) DESC, node.name
 0384            LIMIT $topK
 0385            """;
 386
 387        try
 388        {
 0389            var cursor = await session.RunAsync(
 0390                cypher,
 0391                new
 0392                {
 0393                    embedding = queryEmbedding,
 0394                    projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext),
 0395                    nodeTypes = new[]
 0396                    {
 0397                        CodeNodeType.ApiEndpoint.ToString(),
 0398                        CodeNodeType.Method.ToString(),
 0399                        CodeNodeType.Class.ToString(),
 0400                        CodeNodeType.Interface.ToString(),
 0401                        CodeNodeType.File.ToString(),
 0402                        CodeNodeType.ExternalConcept.ToString()
 0403                    },
 0404                    minScore = 0.45,
 0405                    topK = Math.Clamp(topK, 1, 50)
 0406                });
 407
 0408            var results = new List<(CodeNode, double)>();
 0409            await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 0410                results.Add((MapToCodeNode(record["node"].As<INode>()), record["score"].As<double>()));
 411
 0412            return results;
 413        }
 0414        catch (Exception ex) when (ex.Message.Contains("vector", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
 0415                                   || ex.Message.Contains("embedding", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
 416        {
 0417            _logger.LogWarning(ex, "Vector similarity unavailable for implementation-pattern discovery.");
 0418            return [];
 419        }
 0420    }
 421
 422    /// <summary>
 423    /// Encapsulates the GDS project → stream → drop lifecycle.
 424    /// Projects a named in-memory graph, streams algorithm results, then drops the projection.
 425    /// The <paramref name="parameters"/> object must contain a <c>graphName</c> property.
 426    /// </summary>
 427    // Duplicate-code workflow query.
 428    /// <summary>
 429    /// Find semantically similar method/class pairs for duplicate-code review.
 430    /// </summary>
 431    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<DuplicateCandidate>> FindDuplicateCandidatesAsync(
 432        string? projectContext = null,
 433        string? namespaceFilter = null,
 434        CodeNodeType? nodeType = null,
 435        int minLineCount = 5,
 436        double minSimilarity = 0.88,
 437        bool excludeTests = true,
 438        int limit = 20,
 439        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
 440    {
 0441        await using var session = _driver.AsyncSession();
 442
 0443        var sourceRole = FileRoleExpression("source");
 0444        var candidateRole = FileRoleExpression("candidate");
 0445        var testRole = FileRoleExpression("test");
 0446        var cypher = $@"
 0447            MATCH (source:CodeNode)
 0448            WHERE source.embedding IS NOT NULL
 0449              AND source.type IN $nodeTypes
 0450              AND coalesce(source.lineCount, 0) >= $minLineCount
 0451              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR source.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 0452              AND ($namespaceFilterNormalized IS NULL OR source.namespaceNormalized CONTAINS $namespaceFilterNormalized)
 0453              AND (
 0454                $excludeTests = false OR
 0455                {sourceRole} <> 'Test'
 0456              )
 0457              AND {sourceRole} IN ['Source', 'Test', 'Unknown']
 0458              AND {sourceRole} <> 'Migration'
 0459              AND {sourceRole} <> 'Snapshot'
 0460              AND {sourceRole} <> 'Generated'
 0461              AND {sourceRole} <> 'BuildArtifact'
 0462            WITH source
 0463            ORDER BY coalesce(source.lineCount, 0) DESC
 0464            LIMIT $candidatePool
 0465
 0466            MATCH (candidate:CodeNode)
 0467            WHERE candidate.embedding IS NOT NULL
 0468              AND candidate.id > source.id
 0469              AND candidate.type = source.type
 0470              AND coalesce(candidate.lineCount, 0) >= $minLineCount
 0471              AND ($projectContextNormalized IS NULL OR candidate.projectContextNormalized = $projectContextNormalized)
 0472              AND ($namespaceFilterNormalized IS NULL OR candidate.namespaceNormalized CONTAINS $namespaceFilterNormaliz
 0473              AND (
 0474                $excludeTests = false OR
 0475                {candidateRole} <> 'Test'
 0476              )
 0477              AND {candidateRole} IN ['Source', 'Test', 'Unknown']
 0478              AND {candidateRole} <> 'Migration'
 0479              AND {candidateRole} <> 'Snapshot'
 0480              AND {candidateRole} <> 'Generated'
 0481              AND {candidateRole} <> 'BuildArtifact'
 0482            WITH source, candidate, vector.similarity.cosine(source.embedding, candidate.embedding) AS score
 0483            WHERE score >= $minSimilarity
 0484            CALL {{
 0485              WITH source
 0486              MATCH (source)<-[r:Calls|Uses]-(:CodeNode)
 0487              RETURN count(r) AS sourceFanIn
 0488            }}
 0489            CALL {{
 0490              WITH candidate
 0491              MATCH (candidate)<-[r:Calls|Uses]-(:CodeNode)
 0492              RETURN count(r) AS candidateFanIn
 0493            }}
 0494            CALL {{
 0495              WITH source
 0496              OPTIONAL MATCH (test:CodeNode)-[:Calls]->(source)
 0497              WHERE {testRole} = 'Test'
 0498              RETURN count(test) > 0 AS sourceHasTestCoverage
 0499            }}
 0500            CALL {{
 0501              WITH candidate
 0502              OPTIONAL MATCH (test:CodeNode)-[:Calls]->(candidate)
 0503              WHERE {testRole} = 'Test'
 0504              RETURN count(test) > 0 AS candidateHasTestCoverage
 0505            }}
 0506            RETURN source, candidate, score, sourceFanIn, candidateFanIn, sourceHasTestCoverage, candidateHasTestCoverag
 0507            ORDER BY score DESC, (sourceFanIn + candidateFanIn) DESC
 0508            LIMIT $limit
 0509            ";
 510
 0511        var nodeTypes = nodeType.HasValue
 0512            ? [nodeType.Value.ToString()]
 0513            : new[] { CodeNodeType.Method.ToString(), CodeNodeType.Class.ToString() };
 514
 515        try
 516        {
 0517            var cursor = await session.RunAsync(cypher, new
 0518            {
 0519                projectContextNormalized = (object?)Normalize(projectContext),
 0520                namespaceFilterNormalized = (object?)Normalize(namespaceFilter),
 0521                nodeTypes,
 0522                minLineCount,
 0523                minSimilarity,
 0524                excludeTests,
 0525                limit,
 0526                candidatePool = Math.Max(limit * 10, 100)
 0527            });
 528
 0529            var results = new List<DuplicateCandidate>();
 0530            await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 531            {
 0532                results.Add(new DuplicateCandidate(
 0533                    MapToCodeNode(record["source"].As<INode>()),
 0534                    MapToCodeNode(record["candidate"].As<INode>()),
 0535                    record["score"].As<double>(),
 0536                    record["sourceFanIn"].As<int>(),
 0537                    record["candidateFanIn"].As<int>(),
 0538                    record["sourceHasTestCoverage"].As<bool>(),
 0539                    record["candidateHasTestCoverage"].As<bool>()));
 540            }
 541
 0542            return results;
 543        }
 0544        catch (Exception ex) when (ex.Message.Contains("vector", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
 0545                                   || ex.Message.Contains("embedding", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
 546        {
 0547            _logger.LogWarning(ex, "Vector similarity unavailable for duplicate-candidate discovery.");
 0548            return [];
 549        }
 0550    }
 551
 552    /// <summary>
 553    /// Encapsulates the GDS project/stream/drop lifecycle.
 554    /// Projects a named in-memory graph, streams algorithm results, then drops the projection.
 555    /// The <paramref name="parameters"/> object must contain a <c>graphName</c> property.
 556    /// </summary>
 557    private static async Task<IReadOnlyList<T>> RunGdsStreamAsync<T>(
 558        IAsyncSession session,
 559        string graphName,
 560        string projectCypher,
 561        string streamCypher,
 562        object parameters,
 563        Func<IRecord, T> mapRecord,
 564        CancellationToken ct)
 565    {
 566        try
 567        {
 0568            await (await session.RunAsync(projectCypher, new { graphName })).ConsumeAsync();
 569
 0570            var cursor = await session.RunAsync(streamCypher, parameters);
 0571            var results = new List<T>();
 572
 0573            await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(ct))
 0574                results.Add(mapRecord(record));
 575
 0576            return results;
 577        }
 578        finally
 579        {
 0580            await (await session.RunAsync(
 0581                "CALL gds.graph.drop($graphName, false) YIELD graphName",
 0582                new { graphName })).ConsumeAsync();
 583        }
 0584    }
 585
 586    private static async Task<string?> BuildRelationshipProjectionAsync(
 587        IAsyncSession session,
 588        IReadOnlyCollection<string> preferredTypes,
 589        bool undirected,
 590        CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 591    {
 0592        var cursor = await session.RunAsync(
 0593            """
 0594            CALL db.relationshipTypes() YIELD relationshipType
 0595            RETURN collect(relationshipType) AS relationshipTypes
 0596            """);
 597
 0598        List<string>? available = null;
 0599        await foreach (var record in cursor.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))
 0600            available = record["relationshipTypes"].As<List<string>>();
 601
 0602        if (available is null || available.Count == 0)
 0603            return null;
 604
 0605        var availableLookup = available.ToHashSet(StringComparer.Ordinal);
 0606        var relationshipTypes = preferredTypes
 0607            .Where(availableLookup.Contains)
 0608            .Distinct(StringComparer.Ordinal)
 0609            .ToArray();
 610
 0611        if (relationshipTypes.Length == 0)
 0612            return null;
 613
 0614        var orientation = undirected ? "UNDIRECTED" : "NATURAL";
 0615        return "{ " + string.Join(", ", relationshipTypes.Select(type => $"{type}: {{orientation: '{orientation}'}}")) +
 0616    }
 617}
